chapters.title_arabic: باب فِيمَنْ يُثْنَى عَلَيْهِ خَيْرٌ أَوْ شَرٌّ مِنَ الْمَوْتَى ‏‏

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning one who finds relief and one from whom relief is found
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي ‏"‏ مُسْتَرِيحٌ وَمُسْتَرَاحٌ مِنْهُ ‏"‏ ‏‏

chapters.title: Saying the takbir over the deceased
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي التَّكْبِيرِ عَلَى الْجَنَازَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Praying over the grave
chapters.title_arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ عَلَى الْقَبْرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Standing for funerals
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْقِيَامِ لِلْجَنَازَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Abrogation of standing for funerals
chapters.title_arabic: باب نَسْخِ الْقِيَامِ لِلْجَنَازَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Supplicating for the deceased during the (funeral) prayer
chapters.title_arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ لِلْمَيِّتِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Where the Imam should stand in relation to the deceased when performing the funeral prayer
chapters.title_arabic: باب أَيْنَ يَقُومُ الإِمَامُ مِنَ الْمَيِّتِ لِلصَّلاَةِ عَلَيْهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Riding back after the funeral
chapters.title_arabic: باب رُكُوبِ الْمُصَلِّي عَلَى الْجَنَازَةِ إِذَا انْصَرَفَ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Lahd (Niche), and setting up bricks over the deceased
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي اللَّحْدِ وَنَصْبِ اللَّبِنِ عَلَى الْمَيِّتِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Putting a piece of velvet in the grave
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَعْلِ الْقَطِيفَةِ فِي الْقَبْرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The command to level the grave
chapters.title_arabic: باب الأَمْرِ بِتَسْوِيَةِ الْقَبْرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of plastering graves or erecting structures over them
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ تَجْصِيصِ الْقَبْرِ، وَالْبِنَاءِ، عَلَيْهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Prohibition against sitting and praying on graves
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ الْجُلُوسِ، عَلَى الْقَبْرِ وَالصَّلاَةِ عَلَيْهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Offering the funeral prayer in the masjid
chapters.title_arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ عَلَى الْجَنَازَةِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ ‏‏

chapters.title: What is to be said when entering the graveyard and supplicating for its occupants
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا يُقَالُ عِنْدَ دُخُولِ الْقُبُورِ وَالدُّعَاءِ لأَهْلِهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: The prophet (saws) asked his Lord for permission to visit the grave of his mother
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِئْذَانِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم رَبَّهُ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ فِي زِيَارَةِ قَبْرِ أُمِّهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Leaving the funeral prayer for one who committed suicide
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَرْكِ الصَّلاَةِ عَلَى الْقَاتِلِ نَفْسَهُ ‏‏

chapters.title: On what one-tenth or half of one-tenth is due
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا فِيهِ الْعُشْرُ أَوْ نِصْفُ الْعُشْرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Muslim is not obliged to give Zakat on his slave nor his horse
chapters.title_arabic: باب لاَ زَكَاةَ عَلَى الْمُسْلِمِ فِي عَبْدِهِ وَفَرَسِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Paying or withholding Zakat
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي تَقْدِيمِ الزَّكَاةِ وَمَنْعِهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: Zakat Al-Fitr is due from the muslims in the form of dates and barley
chapters.title_arabic: باب زَكَاةِ الْفِطْرِ عَلَى الْمُسْلِمِينَ مِنَ التَّمْرِ وَالشَّعِيرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The command to pay Zakat Al-Fitr before the prayer
chapters.title_arabic: باب الأَمْرِ بِإِخْرَاجِ زَكَاةِ الْفِطْرِ قَبْلَ الصَّلاَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The sin of one who withholds Zakat
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِثْمِ مَانِعِ الزَّكَاةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Pleasing the Su'ah (Zakat Collectors)
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِرْضَاءِ السُّعَاةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Severe Punishment for the one who does not pay Zakat
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَغْلِيظِ عُقُوبَةِ مَنْ لاَ يُؤَدِّي الزَّكَاةَ ‏‏

chapters.title: Encouragement to give Charity
chapters.title_arabic: باب التَّرْغِيبِ فِي الصَّدَقَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Stern warning concerning those who hoard wealth
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي الْكَنَّازِينَ لِلأَمْوَالِ وَالتَّغْلِيظِ عَلَيْهِمْ ‏‏

chapters.title: Encouragement to spend and glad tidings of compensation for the one who spends on good deeds
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْحَثِّ عَلَى النَّفَقَةِ وَتَبْشِيرِ الْمُنْفِقِ بِالْخَلَفِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The virtue of spending on one's family and slaves, and the sin of the one who neglects them or withholds maintenance from them
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ النَّفَقَةِ عَلَى الْعِيَالِ وَالْمَمْلُوكِ وَإِثْمِ مَنْ ضَيَّعَهُمْ أَوْ حَبَسَ نَفَقَتَهُمْ عَنْهُمْ

chapters.title: Starting with oneself, then one's family, then one's relatives, when spending
chapters.title_arabic: باب الاِبْتِدَاءِ فِي النَّفَقَةِ بِالنَّفْسِ ثُمَّ أَهْلِهِ ثُمَّ الْقَرَابَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The virtue of spending and giving charity to relatives, spuses, children and parents, even if they are idolaters
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ النَّفَقَةِ وَالصَّدَقَةِ عَلَى الْأَقْرَبِينَ وَالزَّوْجِ وَالْأَوْلَادِ وَالْوَالِدَيْنِ وَلَوْ كَانُوا مُشْرِكِينَ

chapters.title: Charity given on behalf of the deceased will reach him
chapters.title_arabic: باب وُصُولِ ثَوَابِ الصَّدَقَةِ عَنِ الْمَيِّتِ، إِلَيْهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The word charity (Sadaqah) may apply to all good deeds Ma'ruf
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ اسْمَ الصَّدَقَةِ يَقَعُ عَلَى كُلِّ نَوْعٍ مِنَ الْمَعْرُوفِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The one who spends and the one who withholds
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي الْمُنْفِقِ وَالْمُمْسِكِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Encouragement to give charity before there is no one to accept it
chapters.title_arabic: باب التَّرْغِيبِ فِي الصَّدَقَةِ قَبْلَ أَنْ لاَ يُوجَدَ مَنْ يَقْبَلُهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: Acceptance of charity that comes from good (Tayyib) earnings, and the growth thereof
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَبُولِ الصَّدَقَةِ مِنَ الْكَسْبِ الطَّيِّبِ وَتَرْبِيَتِهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: Encouragement to give charity even if it is with half a date or a kind word. And charity is a shield against the fire.
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْحَثِّ عَلَى الصَّدَقَةِ وَلَوْ بِشِقِّ تَمْرَةٍ أَوْ كَلِمَةٍ طَيِّبَةٍ وَأَنَّهَا حِجَابٌ مِنْ النَّارِ

chapters.title: Carrying goods for payment and giving charity out of one's wages, and the stern prohibition of belittling the one who gives something small in charity
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْحَمْلِ بِأُجْرَةٍ يُتَصَدَّقُ بِهَا وَالنَّهْىِ الشَّدِيدِ عَنْ تَنْقِيصِ الْمُتَصَدِّقِ بِقَلِيل

chapters.title: The virute of giving gifts
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْمَنِيحَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Likeness of the giver and the miser
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَثَلِ الْمُنْفِقِ وَالْبَخِيلِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Confirmation of the reward of the one who gives Charity, even if the Charity ends up in the hands of an evildoer, and the like
chapters.title_arabic: باب ثُبُوتِ أَجْرِ الْمُتَصَدِّقِ وَإِنْ وَقَعَتِ الصَّدَقَةُ فِي يَدِ غَيْرِ أَهْلِهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: The reward of the Trustworthy Trustee, and if a woman gives charity from her husband's house without causing any damage, with his explicit or implicit permission
chapters.title_arabic: باب أَجْرِ الْخَازِنِ الأَمِينِ وَالْمَرْأَةِ إِذَا تَصَدَّقَتْ مِنْ بَيْتِ زَوْجِهَا غَيْرَ مُفْسِدَةٍ ب

chapters.title: What a slave spends of his master's wealth
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا أَنْفَقَ الْعَبْدُ مِنْ مَالِ مَوْلاَهُ ‏‏

chapters.title: The virtue of the one who does other kinds of good deeds in addition to giving charity
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَنْ جَمَعَ الصَّدَقَةَ وَأَعْمَالَ الْبِرِّ ‏‏

chapters.title: Encouragement to spend, and it is disliked to count how much
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْحَثِّ فِي الإِنْفَاقِ وَكَرَاهَةِ الإِحْصَاءِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Encouragement to give in charity even if it is a little, and a little should not be withheld because one thinks it is too little
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْحَثِّ عَلَى الصَّدَقَةِ وَلَوْ بِالْقَلِيلِ وَلاَ تُمْتَنَعُ مِنَ الْقَلِيلِ لاِحْتِقَارِهِ ‏

chapters.title: The virtue of concealing (what is given in) charity
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ إِخْفَاءِ الصَّدَقَةِ ‏

chapters.title: The best of charity is that which is given when one is healthy and inclined to be stingy
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ أَفْضَلَ الصَّدَقَةِ صَدَقَةُ الصَّحِيحِ الشَّحِيحِ ‏

chapters.title: The upper hand is better than the lower hand, and the upper hand is the one that gives and the lower hand is the one that receives
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ الْيَدَ الْعُلْيَا خَيْرٌ مِنْ الْيَدِ السُّفْلَى وَأَنَّ الْيَدَ الْعُلْيَا هِيَ الْمُنْفِقَةُ وَأَنَّ السُّفْلَى هِيَ الْآخِذَةُ

chapters.title: The prohibition of Begging
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ الْمَسْأَلَةِ ‏

chapters.title: The poor person who cannot find enough to make him independent of means, but the people do not realize that he is in need, so they do not give Charity to him
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْمِسْكِينِ الَّذِي لاَ يَجِدُ غِنًى وَلاَ يُفْطَنُ لَهُ فَيُتَصَدَّقَ عَلَيْهِ ‏

chapters.title: It is disliked to beg from people
chapters.title_arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ الْمَسْأَلَةِ لِلنَّاسِ ‏

chapters.title: The one for whom it is permissible to ask for help
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَنْ تَحِلُّ لَهُ الْمَسْأَلَةُ ‏

chapters.title: It is permissible to take without asking for it or hoping for it
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِبَاحَةِ الأَخْذِ لِمَنْ أُعْطِيَ مِنْ غَيْرِ مَسْأَلَةٍ وَلاَ إِشْرَافٍ ‏

chapters.title: It is disliked to be eager to acquire worldly gains
chapters.title_arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ الْحِرْصِ عَلَى الدُّنْيَا ‏

chapters.title: If the Son of Adam had two valleys, he would desire a third
chapters.title_arabic: باب لَوْ أَنَّ لاِبْنِ آدَمَ وَادِيَيْنِ لاَبْتَغَى ثَالِثًا ‏

chapters.title: The virtue of contentment and encouragement thereof
chapters.title_arabic: باب لَيْسَ الْغِنَى عَنْ كَثْرَةِ الْعَرَضِ

chapters.title: Warning against being deceived by the splendor and luxury of this world
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَخَوُّفِ مَا يَخْرُجُ مِنْ زَهْرَةِ الدُّنْيَا ‏

chapters.title: The virtue of refraining from asking and being patient and content
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ التَّعَفُّفِ وَالصَّبْرِ ‏

chapters.title: Sufficient provision and contentment
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي الْكَفَافِ وَالْقَنَاعَةِ ‏

chapters.title: Giving to those whose hearts have been inclined (towards Islam) and to those for whose faith there is fear if they are not given anything, and putting up with the one who asks rudely due to ignorance, and the Khawarij and rulings regarding them
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِعْطَاءِ مَنْ سَأَلَ بِفُحْشٍ وَغِلْظَةٍ ‏

chapters.title: Giving to one whose faith one fears
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِعْطَاءِ مَنْ يُخَافُ عَلَى إِيمَانِهِ ‏

chapters.title: Giving to those whose hearts have been inclined (towards Islam) and urging those whose faith is strong to show patience
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِعْطَاءِ الْمُؤَلَّفَةِ قُلُوبُهُمْ عَلَى الإِسْلاَمِ وَتَصَبُّرِ مَنْ قَوِيَ إِيمَانُهُ ‏

chapters.title: The Khawarij and their attributes
chapters.title_arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الْخَوَارِجِ وَصِفَاتِهِمْ ‏

chapters.title: Exhortation to kill the Khawarij
chapters.title_arabic: باب التَّحْرِيضِ عَلَى قَتْلِ الْخَوَارِجِ ‏

chapters.title: The Khawarij are the most evil of people and of all creation
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْخَوَارِجُ شَرُّ الْخَلْقِ وَالْخَلِيقَةِ ‏

chapters.title: Zakat is forbidden for the messenger of Allah pbuh and his family, and they are Banu Hashim and Banu Al-Muttalib, and no one else
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الزَّكَاةِ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَهُمْ بَنُو هَاشِمٍ وَبَنُو الْمُطَّلِبِ دُونَ غَيْرِهِمْ

chapters.title: Not appointing the family of the prophet (saws) in charge of charity
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَرْكِ اسْتِعْمَالِ آلِ النَّبِيِّ عَلَى الصَّدَقَةِ ‏

chapters.title: Gifts are permissible for the Prophet (saws) and Banu Hashim and Banu Al-Muttalib, even if the giver acquired it by way of charity. When the receipient takes possession of Charity, it is no longer described as charity, and it is permissible for anyone for whom charity is otherwise unlawful
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِبَاحَةِ الْهَدِيَّةِ لِلنَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَلِبَنِي هَاشِمٍ وَبَنِي الْمُطَّلِبِ

chapters.title: The prophet (saws) accepted gifts but refused Charity
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَبُولِ النَّبِيِّ الْهَدِيَّةَ وَرَدِّهِ الصَّدَقَةَ ‏‏

chapters.title: The supplication for the one who brings Charity
chapters.title_arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ لِمَنْ أَتَى بِصَدَقَتِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Pleasing the Zakat Collector unless he asks for something unlawful
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِرْضَاءِ السَّاعِي مَا لَمْ يَطْلُبْ حَرَامًا ‏‏

chapters.title: The Virtues of the month of Ramadan
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ ‏‏

chapters.title: The obligation to fast Ramadan when the crescent is sighted, and to break the fast when the crescent is sighted, and that if it is cloudy at the beginning or end of the month, then the month should be completed as thirty days.
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب وُجُوبِ صَوْمِ رَمَضَانَ لِرُؤْيَةِ الْهِلَالِ وَالْفِطْرِ لِرُؤْيَةِ الْهِلَالِ وَأَنَّهُ إِذَا غُمَّ فِي أَوَّلِهِ أَوْ آخِرِهِ أُكْمِلَتْ عِدَّةُ الشَّهْرِ ثَلَاثِينَ يَوْمًا

chapters.title: Do not start fasting one or two days before Ramadan
chapters.title_arabic: باب لاَ تَقَدَّمُوا رَمَضَانَ بِصَوْمِ يَوْمٍ وَلاَ يَوْمَيْنِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The month may be twenty-nine days
chapters.title_arabic: باب الشَّهْرُ يَكُونُ تِسْعًا وَعِشْرِينَ ‏‏

chapters.title: Each land has its own sighting of the moon, and if they see the crescent in one land, that does not necessarily apply to regions that are far away from it
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ لِكُلِّ بَلَدٍ رُؤْيَتَهُمْ وَأَنَّهُمْ إِذَا رَأَوْا الْهِلَالَ بِبَلَدٍ لَا يَثْبُتُ حُكْمُهُ لِمَا بَعُدَ عَنْهُمْ

chapters.title: Clarifying that it does not matter whether the crescent is large or small, for Allah, the Most High, causes it to appear for long enough that people can see it, and if it is cloudy then thirty days should be completed
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّهُ لَا اعْتِبَارَ بِكُبْرِ الْهِلَالِ وَصِغَرِهِ وَأَنَّ اللَّهَ تَعَالَى أَمَدَّهُ لِلرُّؤْيَةِ فَإِنْ غُمَّ فَلْيُكْمَلْ ثَلَاثُونَ

chapters.title: The meaning of the Prophet's words: "The two months of 'Id cannot both be incomplete"
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ مَعْنَى قَوْلِهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ شَهْرَا عِيدٍ لَا يَنْقُصَانِ

chapters.title: Clarifying that fasting begins at dawn, and a person may eat and other than that until dawn begins; And clarifying the dawn which has to do with the rulings concerning the beginning of fasting and the beginning of the time for the Subh Prayer, and other than that, which is the Second Dawn, which is called the True Dawn. The First Dawn, which is the False Dawn, has nothing to do with the rulings
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب بَيَانِ أَنَّ الدُّخُولَ فِي الصَّوْمِ يَحْصُلُ بِطُلُوعِ الْفَجْرِ وَأَنَّ لَهُ الْأَكْلَ وَغَيْرَهُ حَتَّى يَطْلُعَ الْفَجْرُ وَبَيَانِ صِفَةِ الْفَجْرِ الَّذِي تَتَعَلَّقُ بِهِ الْأَحْكَامُ مِنْ الدُّخُولِ فِي الصَّوْمِ وَدُخُولِ وَقْتِ صَلَاةِ الصُّبْحِ وَغَيْرِ ذَلِكَ

chapters.title: The virtue of sahur, which is recommended. It is recommended to delay it and to hasten the breaking of the fast
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ السُّحُورِ وَتَأْكِيدِ اسْتِحْبَابِهِ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ تَأْخِيرِهِ وَتَعْجِيلِ الْفِطْرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Clarifying the time for ending the fast and the end of the day
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ وَقْتِ انْقِضَاءِ الصَّوْمِ وَخُرُوجِ النَّهَارِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of Al-Wisal
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ الْوِصَالِ، فِي الصَّوْمِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Clarifying that Kissing when fasting is not unlawful for the one whose desire is not provoked by that
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ الْقُبْلَةَ فِي الصَّوْمِ لَيْسَتْ مُحَرَّمَةً عَلَى مَنْ لَمْ تُحَرِّكْ شَهْوَتَهُ ‏‏

chapters.title: The fasting is valid for the one who is Junub when dawn comes
chapters.title_arabic: باب صِحَّةِ صَوْمِ مَنْ طَلَعَ عَلَيْهِ الْفَجْرُ وَهُوَ جُنُبٌ ‏‏

chapters.title: The strict prohibition of intercourse during the day in Ramadan for one who is fasting; And the obligation of offering major expiation and the definition thereof; And that it is obligatory for both the one who can afford it and the one who cannot afford it, and it remains an obligation for the one who cannot afford it until he has the means
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَغْلِيظِ تَحْرِيمِ الْجِمَاعِ فِي نَهَارِ رَمَضَانَ عَلَى الصَّائِمِ وَوُجُوبِ الْكَفَّارَةِ الْكُبْرَى فِيهِ وبيانها وأنها تجب على الموسر والمعسر وتثبت في ذمة المعسر حتى يستطيع

chapters.title: It is permissible to fast or not to fast during Ramadan for one who is travelling for no sinful purpose, if his journey is two stages or further. But it is better for the one who is able to fast without suffering any harm to do so, and the one for whom it is difficult may break the fast
chapters.title_arabic: باب جواز الصوم والفطر في شهر رمضان للمسافر في غير معصية إذا كان سفره مرحلتين فأكثر وأن الأفضل لمن أطاقه بلا ضرر أن يصوم ولمن يشق عليه أن يفطر

chapters.title: The reward of the one who does not fast when travelling if he does any tasks that are required
chapters.title_arabic: باب أَجْرِ الْمُفْطِرِ فِي السَّفَرِ إِذَا تَوَلَّى الْعَمَلَ ‏‏

chapters.title: The choice between fasting and not fasting when travelling
chapters.title_arabic: باب التَّخْيِيرِ فِي الصَّوْمِ وَالْفِطْرِ فِي السَّفَرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: It is recommended for the person performing Hajj in 'Arafat not to fast on the day of 'Arafah.
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الْفِطْرِ لِلْحَاجِّ بِعَرَفَاتٍ يَوْمَ عَرَفَةَ ‏‏

chapters.title: Fasting on the day of Ashura'
chapters.title_arabic: باب صَوْمِ يَوْمِ عَاشُورَاءَ ‏‏

chapters.title: Which day should be fasted for 'Ashura?
chapters.title_arabic: باب أَىُّ يَوْمٍ يُصَامُ فِي عَاشُورَاءَ ‏‏

chapters.title: Whoever eats on'Ashura, let him refrain (from eating) for the rest of the day
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَنْ أَكَلَ فِي عَاشُورَاءَ فَلْيَكُفَّ بَقِيَّةَ يَوْمِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of fasting on the two days of 'Id
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ صَوْمِ، يَوْمِ الْفِطْرِ وَيَوْمِ الأَضْحَى ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of fasting the days of At-Tashriq, which are the days of eating, drinking and remembering Allah, The Mighty and Sublime
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ صَوْمِ أَيَّامِ التَّشْرِيقِ ‏

chapters.title: It is disliked to single out Friday for fasting, unless it coincides with a day that one customarily fasts
chapters.title_arabic: باب كَرَاهِيَةِ صِيَامِ يَوْمِ الْجُمُعَةِ مُنْفَرِدًا

chapters.title: The Saying of Allah Most High: "... And as for those who can fast with difficulty, they have) a choice either to fast or) to feed a Miskin (poor person) (for every day)" is Abrogated by His saying: "... So whoever of you sights (the crescent on the first night of) the month (of Ramadan i.e. is present at his home), he must observe Sawm (fasts) that month"...
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ نَسْخِ قَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى <qref chapter="2" verses="184">‏{‏ وَعَلَى الَّذِينَ يُطِيقُونَه}</qref> فِدْيَةٌ بِقَوْلِهِ فَمَنْ شَهِدَ مِنْكُمْ الشَّهْرَ فَلْيَصُمْهُ

chapters.title: It is Permissible to delay making up missed Ramadan Fasts until before the next Ramadan comes, and this is for those who broke the fast for a reason such as sickness, travel, menstruation and the like
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَضَاءِ رَمَضَانَ فِي شَعْبَانَ ‏

chapters.title: Making up fasts on behalf of the deceased
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَضَاءِ الصِّيَامِ عَنِ الْمَيِّتِ

chapters.title: If a fasting person is invited to eat and he does not want to break his fast, or someone insults him or argues with him, it is recommended for him to say: "I am Fasting", and he should protect his fast from obscene speech, ignorance and the like
chapters.title_arabic: باب الصَّائِمِ يُدْعَى لِطَعَامٍ أَوْ يُقَاتَلُ فَلْيَقُلْ إِنِّي صَائِمٌ ‏

chapters.title: Guarding One's Tongue when Fasting
chapters.title_arabic: باب حِفْظِ اللِّسَانِ لِلصَّائِمِ ‏

chapters.title: The Virtue of Fasting
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ الصِّيَامِ ‏

chapters.title: The Virtue of Fasting for in the cause of Allah, for those who are able to without suffering any harm or neglecting other duties
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ الصِّيَامِ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ لِمَنْ يُطِيقُهُ بِلاَ ضَرَرٍ وَلاَ تَفْوِيتِ حَقٍّ ‏

chapters.title: It is permissible to observe a voluntary fast with an intention formed during the day before the sun reaches its Zenith, and it is permissible for one who is observing a voluntary fast to break his fast with no excuse, although it is better for him to complete it
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب جَوَازِ صَوْمِ النَّافِلَةِ بِنِيَّةٍ مِنْ النَّهَارِ قَبْلَ الزَّوَالِ وَجَوَازِ فِطْرِ الصَّائِمِ نَفْلًا مِنْ غَيْرِ عُذْرٍ

chapters.title: The one who eats, drinks, or has intercourse by mistake does not break his fast
chapters.title_arabic: باب أَكْلُ النَّاسِي وَشُرْبُهُ وَجِمَاعُهُ لاَ يُفْطِرُ ‏

chapters.title: The Prophet's Fasts at times other than Ramadan; and it is recommended to ensure that no month is free of fasting
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب صِيَامِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فِي غَيْرِ رَمَضَانَ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ أَنْ لَا يُخْلِيَ شَهْرًا عَنْ صَوْمٍ

chapters.title: Prohibition of Fasting for a lifetime for the one who will be harmed by that or who will neglect other duties, or does not break his fast on the two 'Ids or during the days of At-Tashriq; It is better to fast alternate days
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب النَّهْيِ عَنْ صَوْمِ الدَّهْرِ لِمَنْ تَضَرَّرَ بِهِ أَوْ فَوَّتَ بِهِ حَقًّا أَوْ لَمْ يُفْطِرْ الْعِيدَيْنِ وَالتَّشْرِيقَ وَبَيَانِ تَفْضِيلِ صَوْمِ يَوْمٍ وَإِفْطَارِ يَوْمٍ

chapters.title: It is recommended to fast three days of every month, and to fast on the days of 'Arafah and 'Ashura', and to fast on Mondays and Thursdays
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ صِيَامِ ثَلَاثَةِ أَيَّامٍ مِنْ كُلِّ شَهْرٍ وَصَوْمِ يَوْمِ عَرَفَةَ وَعَاشُورَاءَ وَالِاثْنَيْنِ وَالْخَمِيسِ

chapters.title: Fasting at the end of Sha'ban
chapters.title_arabic: باب صَوْمِ سَرَرِ شَعْبَانَ ‏

chapters.title: The virtue of fasting Muharram
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ صَوْمِ الْمُحَرَّمِ ‏

chapters.title: It is recommended to fast Six Days in Shawwal following Ramadan
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ صَوْمِ سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍ مِنْ شَوَّالٍ اتِّبَاعًا لِرَمَضَانَ ‏

chapters.title: The virtue of Lailat Al-Qadr and the Exhortation to seek it; When it is and the most likely times to seek it
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ لَيْلَةِ الْقَدْرِ وَالْحَثِّ عَلَى طَلَبِهَا وَبَيَانِ مَحَلِّهَا وَأَرْجَى أَوْقَاتِ طَلَبِهَا

chapters.title: I'tikaf during the last ten days of Ramadan
chapters.title_arabic: باب اعْتِكَافِ الْعَشْرِ الأَوَاخِرِ مِنْ رَمَضَانَ ‏

chapters.title: When should the one who wants to observe I'tikaf enter his place of I'tikaf?
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَتَى يَدْخُلُ مَنْ أَرَادَ الاِعْتِكَافَ فِي مُعْتَكَفِهِ ‏

chapters.title: Striving harder in worship during the last ten days of Ramadan
chapters.title_arabic: باب الاِجْتِهَادِ فِي الْعَشْرِ الأَوَاخِرِ مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ ‏

chapters.title: Fasting the (first) ten days of Dhul Hijjah
chapters.title_arabic: باب صَوْمِ عَشْرِ ذِي الْحِجَّةِ ‏

chapters.title: What one who has entered Ihram for Hajj or Umrah is permitted to wear, and what is not permissible, and perfume is forbidden for him
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا يُبَاحُ لِلْمُحْرِمِ بِحَجٍّ أَوْ عُمْرَةٍ وَمَا لاَ يُبَاحُ وَبَيَانِ تَحْرِيمِ الطِّيبِ عَلَيْهِ

chapters.title: The Mawaqit of Hajj
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَوَاقِيتِ الْحَجِّ وَالْعُمْرَةِ ‏

chapters.title: The Talbiyah, its description and timing
chapters.title_arabic: باب التَّلْبِيَةِ وَصِفَتِهَا وَوَقْتِهَا ‏

chapters.title: The command to the people of Al-Madinah to enter Ihram from the Masjid at Dhul-Hulaifah
chapters.title_arabic: باب أَمْرِ أَهْلِ الْمَدِينَةِ بِالإِحْرَامِ مِنْ عِنْدِ مَسْجِدِ ذِي الْحُلَيْفَةِ ‏

chapters.title: Clarifying that it is better to enter Ihram when a person's mount sets off with him, heading towards Makkah, not straight after the two rak'ah
chapters.title_arabic: باب الإِهْلاَلِ مِنْ حَيْثُ تَنْبَعِثُ الرَّاحِلَةُ ‏

chapters.title: Praying at the Masjid of Dhul-Hulaifah
chapters.title_arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ فِي مَسْجِدِ ذِي الْحُلَيْفَةِ ‏

chapters.title: It is recommended to apply perfume just before entering Ihram, and it is recommended to use Musk, and it does not matter if its glistening traces remain
chapters.title_arabic: باب الطِّيبِ لِلْمُحْرِمِ عِنْدَ الإِحْرَامِ ‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of hunting game for the one who has entered Ihram for Hajj or for Umrah or for both
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الصَّيْدِ لِلْمُحْرِمِ

chapters.title: What animals it is recommended for the Muhrim and others to kill inside and outside the Sanctuary
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا يُنْدَبُ لِلْمُحْرِمِ وَغَيْرِهِ قَتْلُهُ مِنَ الدَّوَابِّ فِي الْحِلِّ وَالْحَرَمِ ‏

chapters.title: It is permissible for a Muhrim to shave his head if there is a problem, but it is obligatory to offer a Fidyah for shaving it, and Clarifying what the Fidyah is
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ حَلْقِ الرَّأْسِ لِلْمُحْرِمِ إِذَا كَانَ بِهِ أَذًى وَوُجُوبِ الْفِدْيَةِ لِحَلْقِهِ وَبَيَانِ قَدْرِهَا

chapters.title: Cupping is permissible for the Muhrim (pilgrim in Ihram)
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ الْحِجَامَةِ لِلْمُحْرِمِ ‏

chapters.title: It is permissible for a Muhrim to treat his eyes
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ مُدَاوَاةِ الْمُحْرِمِ عَيْنَيْهِ ‏

chapters.title: It is permissible for the Muhrim to wash his body and head
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ غَسْلِ الْمُحْرِمِ بَدَنَهُ وَرَأْسَهُ ‏

chapters.title: What should be done with a Muhrim if he dies?
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا يُفْعَلُ بِالْمُحْرِمِ إِذَا مَاتَ ‏

chapters.title: It is permissible for the Muhrim to stipulate a condition for exiting Ihram because of sickness and the like
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ اشْتِرَاطِ الْمُحْرِمِ التَّحَلُّلَ بِعُذْرِ الْمَرَضِ وَنَحْوِهِ ‏

chapters.title: The soundness of Ihram for the woman in Nifas; It is recommended for her to perform Ghusl before entering Ihram, and the same applies to one who is menstruating
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِحْرَامِ النُّفَسَاءِ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ اغْتِسَالِهَا لِلإِحْرَامِ وَكَذَا الْحَائِضِ ‏

chapters.title: Clarifying the types of Ihram; and that it is permissible to perfom Hajj that is Ifrad, Tamattu and Qiran. It is permissible to join Hajj to Umrah. And when the pilgrim who is performing Qiran should exit Ihram
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ وُجُوهِ الإِحْرَامِ وَأَنَّهُ يَجُوزُ إِفْرَادُ الْحَجِّ وَالتَّمَتُّعِ وَالْقِرَانِ وَجَوَازِ إِدْخَالِ الْحَجِّ عَلَى الْعُمْرَةِ وَمَتَى يَحِلُّ الْقَارِنُ مِنْ نُسُكِهِ

chapters.title: Tamattu with Hajj and Umrah
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي الْمُتْعَةِ بِالْحَجِّ وَالْعُمْرَةِ ‏

chapters.title: The Hajj of the Prophet saws
chapters.title_arabic: باب حَجَّةِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏

chapters.title: All of Arafat is a place of standing
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ أَنَّ عَرَفَةَ كُلَّهَا مَوْقِفٌ ‏

chapters.title: The Standing and the Saying of Allah, The Most High: "Then depart from the place whence all the people depart"
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي الْوُقُوفِ وَقَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى ‏<qref chapter="2" verses="199">{‏ ثُمَّ أَفِيضُوا مِنْ حَيْث أَفَاضَ النَّاسُ}</qref>

chapters.title: It is permissible to base one's intention for Ihram on the intention of another
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي نَسْخِ التَّحَلُّلِ مِنَ الإِحْرَامِ وَالأَمْرِ بِالتَّمَامِ ‏

chapters.title: The Permissibilty of Tamattu'
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ التَّمَتُّعِ

chapters.title: The Obligation For the Pilgrim who is performing Tamattu' to offer a sacrifice; If he has no animal to sacrifice, he must fast for three days during Hajj and seven days when he goes back to his family
chapters.title_arabic: باب وُجُوبِ الدَّمِ عَلَى الْمُتَمَتِّعِ وَأَنَّهُ إِذَا عَدِمَهُ لَزِمَهُ صَوْمُ ثَلاَثَةِ أَيَّامٍ فِي الْحَجِّ وَسَبْعَةٍ إِذَا رَجَعَ إِلَى أَهْلِهِ

chapters.title: The pilgrim performing Qiran should not exit Ihram except when the pilgrims performing Ifrad exit Ihram
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ الْقَارِنَ لاَ يَتَحَلَّلُ إِلاَّ فِي وَقْتِ تَحَلُّلِ الْحَاجِّ الْمُفْرِدِ ‏

chapters.title: It is permissible to exit Ihram if one is prevented from completing Hajj; It is permissible to perform Qiran and the pilgrim performing Qiran should perform just one Tawaf and one Sa'i
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ جَوَازِ التَّحَلُّلِ بِالإِحْصَارِ وَجَوَازِ الْقِرَانِ ‏

chapters.title: Ifrad and Qiran
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي الإِفْرَادِ وَالْقِرَانِ بِالْحَجِّ وَالْعُمْرَةِ ‏

chapters.title: It is recommended for the pilgrim to perform Tawaf Al-Qudum and As-Sa'i after it
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا يَلْزَمُ مَنْ أَحْرَمَ بِالْحَجِّ ثُمَّ قَدِمَ مَكَّةَ مِنَ الطَّوَافِ وَالسَّعْىِ ‏

chapters.title: Clarifying that the pilgrim who has entered Ihram for Umrah should not exit Ihram after performing Tawaf before Sa'i; And the pilgrim who has entered Ihram for Hajj should not exit Ihram after performing Tawaf Al-Qudum, and the same applies to the pilgrim performing Qiran
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا يَلْزَمُ مَنْ طَافَ بِالْبَيْتِ وَسَعَى مِنَ الْبَقَاءِ عَلَى الإِحْرَامِ وَتَرْكِ التَّحَلُّلِ ‏

chapters.title: Tamattu' in Hajj
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي مُتْعَةِ الْحَجِّ ‏

chapters.title: It is permissible to perform 'Umrah during the months of Hajj
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ الْعُمْرَةِ فِي أَشْهُرِ الْحَجِّ ‏

chapters.title: Marking and Garlanding the sacrificial animal when entering Ihram
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَقْلِيدِ الْهَدْىِ وَإِشْعَارِهِ عِنْدَ الإِحْرَامِ ‏

chapters.title: It is permissible for the pilgrim performing Umrah to shorten his hair and he does not have to shave it. It is recommended for him to shave his hair or shorten it at Al-Marwah
chapters.title_arabic: باب التَّقْصِيرِ فِي الْعُمْرَةِ ‏

chapters.title: The Ihram and Hadi of the Prophet (saws)
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِهْلاَلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَهَدْيِهِ ‏

chapters.title: The number of Umrahs performed by the prophet (saws) and when he performed them
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ عَدَدِ عُمَرِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَزَمَانِهِنَّ ‏

chapters.title: The virtue of the Umrah performed during Ramadan
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْعُمْرَةِ فِي رَمَضَانَ ‏

chapters.title: It is recommended to enter Makkah from the Upper Mountain Pass and to leave from the Lower Mountain Pass; Entering a city via a route different than the one by which you leave it
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ دُخُولِ مَكَّةَ مِنَ الثَّنِيَّةِ الْعُلْيَا وَالْخُرُوجِ مِنْهَا مِنَ الثَّنِيَّةِ السُّفْلَى وَدُخُولِ بَلْدَةٍ مِنْ طَرِيقٍ غَيْرِ الَّتِي خَرَجَ مِنْهَا

chapters.title: It is recommended to stay overnight in Dhu Tuwa when intending to enter Makkah, and to perform Ghusl before entering it, and to enter it by day
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الْمَبِيتِ بِذِي طَوًى عِنْدَ إِرَادَةِ دُخُولِ مَكَّةَ وَالاِغْتِسَالِ لِدُخُولِهَا نَهَارًا

chapters.title: Raml (walking rapidly) is recommended in the Tawaf of Umrah, and in the first Tawaf of Hajj
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الرَّمَلِ فِي الطَّوَافِ وَالْعُمْرَةِ وَفِي الطَّوَافِ الأَوَّلِ فِي الْحَجِّ ‏

chapters.title: It is recommended to touch the two Yemeni Corners in Tawaf and not the other two corners
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ اسْتِلاَمِ الرُّكْنَيْنِ الْيَمَانِيَيْنِ فِي الطَّوَافِ دُونَ الرُّكْنَيْنِ الآخَرَيْن

chapters.title: It is recommended to kiss the black stone during circumambulation (Tawaf)
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ تَقْبِيلِ الْحَجَرِ الأَسْوَدِ فِي الطَّوَافِ ‏

chapters.title: It is permissible to circumambulate the Ka'bah on a camel and the like, And for one who is riding to touch the (black) stone with a crooked staff and the like.
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ الطَّوَافِ عَلَى بَعِيرٍ وَغَيْرِهِ وَاسْتِلاَمِ الْحَجَرِ بِمِحْجَنٍ وَنَحْوِهِ لِلرَّاكِبِ

chapters.title: Clarifying that Sa'i between As-safa and Al-Marwah is a pillar of Hajj, without which Hajj is not valid
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ السَّعْىَ بَيْنَ الصَّفَا وَالْمَرْوَةِ رُكْنٌ لاَ يَصِحُّ الْحَجُّ إِلاَّ بِهِ ‏

chapters.title: Clarifying that Sa'i should not be repeated
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ السَّعْىَ لاَ يُكَرَّرُ ‏

chapters.title: It is recommended for the pilgrim to continue reciting the Talbiyah until he starts stoning Jamrat Al-'Aqabah on the day of sacrifice
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ إِدَامَةِ الْحَاجِّ التَّلْبِيَةَ حَتَّى يَشْرَعَ فِي رَمْىِ جَمْرَةِ الْعَقَبَةِ يَوْمَ النَّحْرِ

chapters.title: The Talbiyah and the Takbir when going from Mina to 'Arafat on the day of 'Arafat
chapters.title_arabic: باب التَّلْبِيَةِ وَالتَّكْبِيرِ فِي الذِّهَابِ مِنْ مِنًى إِلَى عَرَفَاتٍ فِي يَوْمِ عَرَفَةَ ‏

chapters.title: Departing from 'Arafat to Al-Muzdalifah. It is recommended to pray Maghrib and 'Isha together in Al-Muzdalifah on this night
chapters.title_arabic: باب الإِفَاضَةِ مِنْ عَرَفَاتٍ إِلَى الْمُزْدَلِفَةِ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ صَلاَتَىِ الْمَغْرِبِ وَالْعِشَاءِ جَمْعًا بِالْمُزْدَلِفَةِ فِي هَذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ

chapters.title: It is recommended to pray Subh when it is still dark on the day of sacrifice in Al-Muzdalifah, and to do it very early after ascertaining that dawn has broken
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ زِيَادَةِ التَّغْلِيسِ بِصَلاَةِ الصُّبْحِ يَوْمَ النَّحْرِ بِالْمُزْدَلِفَةِ وَالْمُبَالَغَةِ فِيهِ بَعْدَ تَحَقُّقِ طُلُوعِ الْفَجْرِ

chapters.title: It is recommended to send the weak among women and others ahead from Al-Muzdalifah to Mina at the end of the night, before it gets crowded, but it is recommended for others to stay there until they have prayed Subh in Al-Muzdalifah
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ تَقْدِيمِ دَفْعِ الضَّعَفَةِ مِنَ النِّسَاءِ وَغَيْرِهِنَّ مِنْ مُزْدَلِفَةَ إِلَى مِنًى فِي أَوَاخِرِ اللَّيَالِي قَبْلَ زَحْمَةِ النَّاسِ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ الْمُكْثِ لِغَيْرِهِمْ حَتَّى يُصَلُّوا الصُّبْحَ بِمُزْدَلِفَةَ

chapters.title: Stoning Jamrat Al-'Aqabah from the bottom of the valley; Makkah should be on to one's left and one should say Takbir with each throw
chapters.title_arabic: باب رَمْىِ جَمْرَةِ الْعَقَبَةِ مِنْ بَطْنِ الْوَادِي وَتَكُونُ مَكَّةُ عَنْ يَسَارِهِ وَيُكَبِّرُ مَعَ كُلِّ حَصَاةٍ

chapters.title: It is recommended to stone Jamrat Al-'Aqabah, on the day of sacrifice, riding, and the prophet saws said: "Learn your rituals (of Hajj) from me"
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ رَمْىِ جَمْرَةِ الْعَقَبَةِ يَوْمَ النَّحْرِ رَاكِبًا وَبَيَانِ قَوْلِهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ تَعَالَى عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «لِتَأْخُذُوا مَنَاسِكَكُمْ»

chapters.title: It is recommended for the pebbles used for stoning to be the size of broad beans
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ كَوْنِ حَصَى الْجِمَارِ بِقَدْرِ حَصَى الْخَذْفِ ‏

chapters.title: The time when it is recommended to stone the Jamrah
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ وَقْتِ اسْتِحْبَابِ الرَّمْىِ ‏

chapters.title: The number of pebbles for stoning the Jamrahs is seven at a time
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ حَصَى الْجِمَارِ سَبْعٌ ‏

chapters.title: Shaving the head is preferrable to cutting the hair, although cutting the hair is permissible
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَفْضِيلِ الْحَلْقِ عَلَى التَّقْصِيرِ وَجَوَازِ التَّقْصِيرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Sunnah on the day of sacrifice is to stone the Jamrah, then offer the sacrifice, then shave the head, and shaving should be started on the right side of the head
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ السُّنَّةَ يَوْمَ النَّحْرِ أَنْ يَرْمِيَ ثُمَّ يَنْحَرَ ثُمَّ يَحْلِقَ وَالاِبْتِدَاءِ فِي الْحَلْقِ بِالْجَانِبِ الأَيْمَنِ مِنْ رَأْسِ الْمَحْلُوقِ

chapters.title: It is permissible to offer the sacrifice before stoning the Jamrah, or to shave before offering the sacrifice or stoning the Jamrah, or to perform Tawaf before any of them
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَنْ حَلَقَ قَبْلَ النَّحْرِ أَوْ نَحَرَ قَبْلَ الرَّمْىِ ‏‏

chapters.title: It is recommended to perform Tawaf Al-Ifadah on the day of sacrifice
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ طَوَافِ الإِفَاضَةِ يَوْمَ النَّحْرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: It is recommended to halt at Al-Muhassab on the day of departing from Mina and to perform Zuhr and subsequent prayers there
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ النُّزُولِ بِالْمُحَصَّبِ يَوْمَ النَّفْرِ وَالصَّلاَةِ بِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: It is obligatory to stay overnight in Mina during the nights of the days of At-Tashriq, and the concession allowing those who supply water to leave
chapters.title_arabic: باب وُجُوبِ الْمَبِيتِ بِمِنًى لَيَالِيَ أَيَّامِ التَّشْرِيقِ وَالتَّرْخِيصِ فِي تَرْكِهِ لأَهْلِ السِّقَايَةِ

chapters.title: Giving the meat, skin and blankets of the Hadi in charity; the butcher should not be given any of it; It is permissible to delegate someone else to offer the sacrifice
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي الصَّدَقَةِ بِلُحُومِ الْهَدْىِ وَجُلُودِهَا وَجِلاَلِهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: It is permissible to share in the sacrifice, and a camel or a cow is sufficient for seven people
chapters.title_arabic: باب الاِشْتِرَاكِ فِي الْهَدْىِ وَإِجْزَاءِ الْبَقَرَةِ وَالْبَدَنَةِ كُلٍّ مِنْهُمَا عَنْ سَبْعَةٍ ‏‏

chapters.title: It is recommended to sacrifice the camel when it is standing and tied
chapters.title_arabic: باب نَحْرِ الْبُدْنِ قِيَامًا مُقَيَّدَةً ‏‏

chapters.title: It is recommended to send the sacrificial animal to the Haram for one who does not intend to go there himself; It is reommended to garland it and to make the garland, but the one who sends it does not enter a state of Ihram, and nothing is forbidden to him because of that
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ بَعْثِ الْهَدْىِ إِلَى الْحَرَمِ لِمَنْ لاَ يُرِيدُ الذَّهَابَ بِنَفْسِهِ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ تَقْلِيدِهِ وَفَتْلِ الْقَلاَئِدِ وَأَنَّ بَاعِثَهُ لاَ يَصِيرُ مُحْرِمًا وَلاَ يَحْرُمُ عَلَيْهِ شيء بِذَلِكَ

chapters.title: It is permissible to ride the sacrificial animal if necessary
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ رُكُوبِ الْبَدَنَةِ الْمُهْدَاةِ لِمَنِ احْتَاجَ إِلَيْهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: What should be done with the sacrificial animal if it gets injured on the way?
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا يُفْعَلُ بِالْهَدْىِ إِذَا عَطِبَ فِي الطَّرِيقِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The farewell Tawaf is obligatory, but it is waived in the case of menstruating women
chapters.title_arabic: باب وُجُوبِ طَوَافِ الْوَدَاعِ وَسُقُوطِهِ عَنِ الْحَائِضِ

chapters.title: It is recommended for pilgrims and others to enter the Ka'bah and pray therein, and supplicate in all its corners
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ دُخُولِ الْكَعْبَةِ لِلْحَاجِّ وَغَيْرِهِ وَالصَّلاَةِ فِيهَا وَالدُّعَاءِ فِي نَوَاحِيهَا كُلِّهَا

chapters.title: Demolishing the Ka'bah and rebuilding it
chapters.title_arabic: باب نَقْضِ الْكَعْبَةِ وَبِنَائِهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: The wall and the door of the Ka'bah
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَدْرِ الْكَعْبَةِ وَبَابِهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: Hajj on behalf of one who is incapable of doing it because of chronic illness, old age and the like, or on behalf of one who has died
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْحَجِّ عَنِ الْعَاجِزِ، لِزَمَانَةٍ وَهِرَمٍ وَنَحْوِهِمَا أَوْ لِلْمَوْتِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Validity of a child's hajj, and the reward of the one who takes him for Hajj
chapters.title_arabic: باب صِحَّةِ حَجِّ الصَّبِيِّ وَأَجْرِ مَنْ حَجَّ بِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Hajj is obligatory once in a lifetime
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَرْضِ الْحَجِّ مَرَّةً فِي الْعُمْرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: A woman travelling with a Mahram for Hajj and other purposes
chapters.title_arabic: باب سَفَرِ الْمَرْأَةِ مَعَ مَحْرَمٍ إِلَى حَجٍّ وَغَيْرِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: It is recommended to recite statements of remembrance when setting out for Hajj or any other purpose, and the best of this remembrances
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا يَقُولُ إِذَا رَكِبَ إِلَى سَفَرٍ الْحَجِّ وَغَيْرِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: What should be said when returning from Hajj and other journeys
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا يَقُولُ إِذَا قَفَلَ مِنْ سَفَرٍ الْحَجِّ وَغَيْرِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: It is recommended to stop in Batha' of Dhul-Hulaifah and pray there when departing from Hajj and 'Umrah, or any time one passes through it
chapters.title_arabic: باب التَّعْرِيسِ بِذِي الْحُلَيْفَةِ وَالصَّلاَةِ بِهَا إِذَا صَدَرَ مِنَ الْحَجِّ أَوِ الْعُمْرَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: No idolator may circumambulate the house, and no one may circumambulate the house naked, and when the greatest day of Hajj is
chapters.title_arabic: باب لاَ يَحُجُّ الْبَيْتَ مُشْرِكٌ وَلاَ يَطُوفُ بِالْبَيْتِ عُرْيَانٌ وَبَيَانُ يَوْمِ الْحَجِّ الأَكْبَبَرِ

chapters.title: The virtue of the day of 'Arafat
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي فَضْلِ الْحَجِّ وَالْعُمْرَةِ وَيَوْمِ عَرَفَةَ ‏‏

chapters.title: Pilgrims staying in Makkah, and Inheriting its houses
chapters.title_arabic: باب النُّزُولِ بِمَكَّةَ لِلْحَاجِّ وَتَوْرِيثِ دُورِهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: It is permissible for the one who emigrated from Makkah to stay there for three days after completing Hajj and 'Umrah, and no more than that
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ الإِقَامَةِ بِمَكَّةَ لِلْمُهَاجِرِ مِنْهَا بَعْدَ فَرَاغِ الْحَجِّ وَالْعُمْرَةِ ثَلاَثَةَ أَيَّامٍ بِلاَ زِيَادَةٍ

chapters.title: The sanctity of Makkah and the sanctity of its game, grasses, trees and lost property, except for the one who announces it, is forever
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ مَكَّةَ وَصَيْدِهَا وَخَلاَهَا وَشَجَرِهَا وَلُقَطَتِهَا إِلاَّ لِمُنْشِدٍ عَلَى الدَّوَام

chapters.title: The prohibition of carrying weapons in Makkah when there is no need for that
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ حَمْلِ السِّلاَحِ، بِمَكَّةَ بِلاَ حَاجَةٍ ‏‏

chapters.title: It is permissible to enter Makkah without Ihram
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ دُخُولِ مَكَّةَ بِغَيْرِ إِحْرَامٍ ‏‏

chapters.title: The virtue of Al-Madinah and the Prophet's Prayer for it to be blessed. Its sanctity and the sanctity of its game and trees. The Boundaries of its sanctuary
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَدُعَاءِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فِيهَا بِالْبَرَكَةِ وَبَيَانِ تَحْرِيمِها وَتَحْرِيمِ صَيْدِهَا وَشَجَرِهَا وَبَيَانِ حُدُودِ حَرَمِهَا

chapters.title: Encouragement to live in Al-Madinah and to be patient on bearing its distress and hardships
chapters.title_arabic: باب التَّرْغِيبِ فِي سُكْنَى الْمَدِينَةِ وَالصَّبْرِ عَلَى لأْوَائِهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: Al-Madinah is protected against the plague and the Dajjal entering it
chapters.title_arabic: باب صِيَانَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ مِنْ دُخُولِ الطَّاعُونِ وَالدَّجَّالِ إِلَيْهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: Al-Madinah eliminates its Dross and it is also called Tabah, and Taibah
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْمَدِينَةِ تَنْفِي شِرَارَهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of wishing ill towards the people of Al-Madinah, and that the one who wishes them ill will be caused to melt by Allah
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَنْ أَرَادَ أَهْلَ الْمَدِينَةِ بِسُوءٍ أَذَابَهُ اللَّهُ ‏‏

chapters.title: Encouraging people to stay in Al-Madinah when the regions were conquered
chapters.title_arabic: باب التَّرْغِيبِ فِي الْمَدِينَةِ عِنْدَ فَتْحِ الأَمْصَارِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Prophet saws foretold that the people will abandon Al-Madinah when it is the best it ever was
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي الْمَدِينَةِ حِينَ يَتْرُكُهَا أَهْلُهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: The virtue of the area between the prophet's grave and his Minbar, and the virtue of the spot where his minbar is
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا بَيْنَ الْقَبْرِ وَالْمِنْبَرِ رَوْضَةٌ مِنْ رِيَاضِ الْجَنَّةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The virtue of Uhud
chapters.title_arabic: باب أُحُدٌ جَبَلٌ يُحِبُّنَا وَنُحِبُّهُ ‏‏

chapters.title: The virtue of praying in the Masajid of Makkah and Al-Madinah
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ الصَّلاَةِ بِمَسْجِدَىْ مَكَّةَ وَالْمَدِينَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The virtue of the Three Masajid
chapters.title_arabic: باب لاَ تُشَدُّ الرِّحَالُ إِلاَّ إِلَى ثَلاَثَةِ مَسَاجِدَ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Masjid whose foundation was founded upon piety is the Masjid of the Prophet saws in Al-Madinah
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ الْمَسْجِدَ الَّذِي أُسِّسَ عَلَى التَّقْوَى هُوَ مَسْجِدُ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم بِالْمَدِينَةِ

chapters.title: The virtue of the Masjid of Quba', and the virtue of praying therein and visiting it
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ مَسْجِدِ قُبَاءٍ وَفَضْلِ الصَّلاَةِ فِيهِ وَزِيَارَتِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Marriage is recommended for the one who desires it and can afford it, and the one who cannot afford it should distract himself by fasting
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ النِّكَاحِ لِمَنْ تَاقَتْ نَفْسُهُ إِلَيْهِ وَوَجَدَ مُؤْنَةً وَاشْتِغَالِ مَنْ عَجَزَ عَنِ الْمُؤَنِ بِالصَّوْمِ

chapters.title: Recommendation to the one who sees a woman and is attracted to her, to go to his wife or slave woman and have intercourse with her
chapters.title_arabic: باب نَدْبِ مَنْ رَأَى امْرَأَةً فَوَقَعَتْ فِي نَفْسِهِ إِلَى أَنْ يَأْتِيَ امْرَأَتَهُ أَوْ جَارِيَتَهُ فَيُوَاقِعَهَا

chapters.title: Mut'ah Marriage: It was permitted then abrograted, then permitted then abrogated, and it will remain Forbidden until the day of resurrection
chapters.title_arabic: باب نِكَاحِ الْمُتْعَةِ وَبَيَانِ أَنَّهُ أُبِيحَ ثُمَّ نُسِخَ ثُمَّ أُبِيحَ ثُمَّ نُسِخَ وَاسْتَقَرَّ تَحْرِيمُهُ إِلَى يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ

chapters.title: The prohibition of being married to a woman and her paternal aunt or maternal aunt at the same time
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الْجَمْعِ بَيْنَ الْمَرْأَةِ وَعَمَّتِهَا أَوْ خَالَتِهَا فِي النِّكَاحِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of marriage for one who is in Ihram, and it is disliked for him to propose marriage
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ نِكَاحِ الْمُحْرِمِ وَكَرَاهَةِ خِطْبَتِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of proposing marriage when one's brother has already proposed, unless he gives permission or gives up the idea
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الْخِطْبَةِ عَلَى خِطْبَةِ أَخِيهِ حَتَّى يَأْذَنَ أَوْ يَتْرُكَ ‏‏

chapters.title: Prohibition and invalidity of Shighar Marriage
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ نِكَاحِ الشِّغَارِ وَبُطْلاَنِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Fulfilling the conditions stipulated in the Marriage
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْوَفَاءِ بِالشُّرُوطِ فِي النِّكَاحِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Seeking permission of a previously-married woman in words, and of a virgin by silence
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِئْذَانِ الثَّيِّبِ فِي النِّكَاحِ بِالنُّطْقِ وَالْبِكْرِ بِالسُّكُوتِ ‏

chapters.title: It is permissible for a father to arrange the marriage of a young virgin
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَزْوِيجِ الأَبِ الْبِكْرَ الصَّغِيرَةَ ‏

chapters.title: It is recommended to get married and arrange marriages in Shawwal, and it is recommended to consummate the marriage in that month
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ التَّزَوُّجِ وَالتَّزْوِيجِ فِي شَوَّالٍ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ الدُّخُولِ فِيهِ ‏

chapters.title: It is recommended for the one who wants to marry a woman to look at her face and hands before proposing marriage to her
chapters.title_arabic: باب نَدْبِ النَّظَرِ إِلَى وَجْهِ الْمَرْأَةِ وَكَفَّيْهَا لِمَنْ يُرِيدُ تَزَوُّجَهَا ‏

chapters.title: The Dowry. It is permissible for the dowry to be teaching Quran, a ring of iron or anything else, a small or large amount, And it is recommended for it to be Five Hundred Dirham
chapters.title_arabic: باب الصَّدَاقِ وَجَوَازِ كَوْنِهِ تَعْلِيمَ قُرْآنٍ وَخَاتَمَ حَدِيدٍ وَغَيْرَ ذَلِكَ مِنْ قَلِيلٍ وَكَثِيرٍ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ كَوْنِهِ خَمْسَمِائَةِ دِرْهَمٍ لِمَنْ لاَ يُجْحَفُ بِهِ

chapters.title: The virute of manumitting one's slave girl, then marrying her
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضِيلَةِ إِعْتَاقِهِ أَمَتَهُ ثُمَّ يَتَزَوَّجُهَا ‏

chapters.title: The Marriage of Zainab Bint Jahsh, The Revelation of (the verse of) Hijab, and confirmation of the importance of the wedding feast.
chapters.title_arabic: باب زَوَاجِ زَيْنَبَ بِنْتِ جَحْشٍ وَنُزُولِ الْحِجَابِ وَإِثْبَاتِ وَلِيمَةِ الْعُرْسِ ‏

chapters.title: The command to accept invitations
chapters.title_arabic: باب الأَمْرِ بِإِجَابَةِ الدَّاعِي إِلَى دَعْوَةٍ ‏

chapters.title: It is not permissible for a woman who has been thrice-divorced to return to the one who divorced her until she marries another husband who has intercourse with her, then divorces her, and she completes the 'Iddah
chapters.title_arabic: باب لاَ تَحِلُّ الْمُطَلَّقَةُ ثَلاَثًا لِمُطَلِّقِهَا حَتَّى تَنْكِحَ زَوْجًا غَيْرَهُ وَيَطَأَهَا ثُمَّ يُفَارِقَهَا وَتَنْقَضِي عِدَّتُهَا

chapters.title: What it is recommended to say when having intercourse
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا يُسْتَحَبُّ أَنْ يَقُولَهُ عِنْدَ الْجِمَاعِ ‏

chapters.title: It is permissible for a man to have intercourse with his wife from the front or from the back, without entering the behind
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ جِمَاعِهِ امْرَأَتَهُ فِي قُبُلِهَا مِنْ قُدَّامِهَا وَمِنْ وَرَائِهَا مِنْ غَيْرِ تَعَرُّضٍ لِلدُّبُرِ

chapters.title: It is unlawful for the wife to refuse to come to her husband's bed
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ امْتِنَاعِهَا مِنْ فِرَاشِ زَوْجِهَا ‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of disclosing a woman's secrets
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ إِفْشَاءِ سِرِّ الْمَرْأَةِ ‏

chapters.title: The ruling on coitus interrupts ('Azl)
chapters.title_arabic: باب حُكْمِ الْعَزْلِ ‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of intercourse with a pregnant captive woman
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ وَطْءِ الْحَامِلِ الْمَسْبِيَّةِ ‏

chapters.title: It is permissible to have intercourse with a breastfeeding woman (Ghilah), and 'Azl is disliked
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ الْغِيلَةِ وَهِيَ وَطْءُ الْمُرْضِعِ وَكَرَاهَةِ الْعَزْلِ

chapters.title: "Breastfeeding Makes Unlawful What Birth Makes Unlawful."
chapters.title_arabic: باب يَحْرُمُ مِنَ الرَّضَاعَةِ مَا يَحْرُمُ مِنَ الْوِلاَدَةِ ‏

chapters.title: The prohibition that results from breastfeeding is related to the issue of the male
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الرَّضَاعَةِ مِنْ مَاءِ الْفَحْلِ ‏

chapters.title: The daughter of one's brother through breastfeeding is forbidden in marriage
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ ابْنَةِ الأَخِ مِنَ الرَّضَاعَةِ ‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of marriage to one's stepdaughter and the sister of one's wife
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الرَّبِيبَةِ وَأُخْتِ الْمَرْأَةِ ‏

chapters.title: One or Two sucks
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي الْمَصَّةِ وَالْمَصَّتَيْنِ ‏

chapters.title: Becoming Mahram is established by Five Breastfeedings
chapters.title_arabic: باب التَّحْرِيمِ بِخَمْسِ رَضَعَاتٍ ‏

chapters.title: Breastfeeding an adult
chapters.title_arabic: باب رَضَاعَةِ الْكَبِيرِ ‏
chapters.intro_arabic: المقصود بالرضاعة هنا أن تفرغ المرأة لبنها في إناء وترسله للرجل ليشربه وتكرر ذلك خمس مرات وبذلك تحرم عليه.

chapters.title: Breastfeeding is because of Hunger (meaning, during infancy)
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِنَّمَا الرَّضَاعَةُ مِنَ الْمَجَاعَةِ

chapters.title: It is permissible to have intercourse with a female captive after it is established that she is not pregnant, and if she has a husband, then her marriage is annulled when she is captured
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ وَطْءِ الْمَسْبِيَّةِ بَعْدَ الاِسْتِبْرَاءِ وَإِنْ كَانَ لَهَا زَوْجٌ انْفَسَخَ نِكَاحُهَا بِالسَّبْي

chapters.title: The child is for the bed and suspicion must be avoided
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْوَلَدِ لِلْفِرَاشِ وَتَوَقِّي الشُّبُهَاتِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Detecting relationships from physical features
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْعَمَلِ بِإِلْحَاقِ الْقَائِفِ الْوَلَدَ ‏‏

chapters.title: How long a virgin and a previously-married woman are entitled to have the husband stay with them after marriage
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَدْرِ مَا تَسْتَحِقُّهُ الْبِكْرُ وَالثَّيِّبُ مِنْ إِقَامَةِ الزَّوْجِ عِنْدَهَا عَقِبَ الزِّفَافِ

chapters.title: Dividing one's time among co-wives; The Sunnah is for each one to have one night and one day
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْقَسْمِ بَيْنَ الزَّوْجَاتِ وَبَيَانِ أَنَّ السُّنَّةَ أَنْ تَكُونَ لِكُلِّ وَاحِدَةٍ لَيْلَةٌ مَعَ يَوْمِهَا

chapters.title: It is permissible for a wife to give her turn to a co-wife
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ هِبَتِهَا نَوْبَتَهَا لِضَرَّتِهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: It is recommended to marry one who is religiously committed
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ نِكَاحِ ذَاتِ الدِّينِ ‏‏

chapters.title: It is recommended to marry virgins
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ نِكَاحِ الْبِكْرِ

chapters.title: The best temporary joy of this world is a righteous woman
chapters.title_arabic: باب خَيْرُ مَتَاعِ الدُّنْيَا الْمَرْأَةُ الصَّالِحَةُ ‏‏

chapters.title: Advice with regard to women
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْوَصِيَّةِ بِالنِّسَاءِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Were it not for Hawa', no female would ever betray her husband
chapters.title_arabic: باب لَوْلاَ حَوَّاءُ لَمْ تَخُنْ أُنْثَى زَوْجَهَا الدَّهْرَ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of divorcing a menstruating woman without her consent; If a man breaks this rule, it still counts as a divorce, and he should be ordered to take her back
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ طَلاَقِ الْحَائِضِ بِغَيْرِ رِضَاهَا وَأَنَّهُ لَوْ خَالَفَ وَقَعَ الطَّلاَقُ وَيُؤْمَرُ بِجْعَتِهَا

chapters.title: Threefold Divorce
chapters.title_arabic: باب طَلاَقِ الثَّلاَثِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Expiation must be offered by one who declares his wife to be unlawful for him but does not intend divorce thereby
chapters.title_arabic: باب وُجُوبِ الْكَفَّارَةِ عَلَى مَنْ حَرَّمَ امْرَأَتَهُ وَلَمْ يَنْوِ الطَّلاَقَ ‏‏

chapters.title: Giving one's wife the choice does not count as a divorce, unless it is intended as such
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ تَخْيِيرَ امْرَأَتِهِ لاَ يَكُونُ طَلاَقًا إِلاَّ بِالنِّيَّةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Ila', Keeping away from one's wives and giving them the choice, And the saying of Allah, The Most High: "But if you help one another against him
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي الإِيلاَءِ وَاعْتِزَالِ النِّسَاءِ وَتَخْيِيرِهِنَّ وَقَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى: {وَإِنْ تَظَاهَرَا عَلَيْهِ}

chapters.title: The woman who has been irrevocably divorced is not entitled to spending
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْمُطَلَّقَةُ ثَلاَثًا لاَ نَفَقَةَ لَهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: It is permissible for a woman who is observing 'Iddah after an irrevocable divorce or the death of her husband to go out during the day if she needs to
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ خُرُوجِ الْمُعْتَدَّةِ الْبَائِنِ وَالْمُتَوَفَّى عَنْهَا زَوْجُهَا فِي النَّهَارِ لِحَاجَتِهَا

chapters.title: The 'Iddah of a woman whose husband had died, and the like, ends when she gives birth.
chapters.title_arabic: باب انْقِضَاءِ عِدَّةِ الْمُتَوَفَّى عَنْهَا زَوْجُهَا وَغَيْرِهَا بِوَضْعِ الْحَمْلِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Obligation to mourn during the 'Iddah following the death of one's husband, but it is forbidden to mourn for more than three days in other cases
chapters.title_arabic: باب وُجُوبِ الإِحْدَادِ فِي عِدَّةِ الْوَفَاةِ وَتَحْرِيمِهِ فِي غَيْرِ ذَلِكَ إِلاَّ ثَلاَثَةَ أَيَّامٍ
باب ‏

chapters.title: One who frees his share of a slave
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَنْ أَعْتَقَ شِرْكًا لَهُ فِي عَبْدٍ ‏‏

chapters.title: A slave working to pay off the other half
chapters.title_arabic: باب ذِكْرِ سِعَايَةِ الْعَبْدِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Al-Wala' (Right of inheritance) belongs to the one who manumits the slave
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِنَّمَا الْوَلاَءُ لِمَنْ أَعْتَقَ

chapters.title: The prohibition of selling or giving away the wala'
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ بَيْعِ الْوَلاَءِ، وَهِبَتِهِ، ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of a manumitted slave taking anyone as a Mawla except the one who manumitted him
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ تَوَلِّي الْعَتِيقِ غَيْرَ مَوَالِيهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The virtue of manumitting slaves
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْعِتْقِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The virtue of manumitting one's father
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ عِتْقِ الْوَالِدِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The invalidity of Mulamasah and Munabadhah transactions
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِبْطَالِ بَيْعِ الْمُلاَمَسَةِ وَالْمُنَابَذَةِ

chapters.title: The invalidity of Hasah transactions and transactions involving ambiguity
chapters.title_arabic: باب بُطْلاَنِ بَيْعِ الْحَصَاةِ وَالْبَيْعِ الَّذِي فِيهِ غَرَرٌ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of selling Habl Al-Habalah
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ بَيْعِ حَبَلِ الْحَبَلَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of urging a buyer to cancel a purchase in order to sell him one's own goods; And urging a seller to cancel a sale already agreed upon so that one can buy the goods oneself; And the prohibition of artificially inflating prices; And the prohibition of letting milk accumulate in the udder in order to deceive the purchaser
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ بَيْعِ الرَّجُلِ عَلَى بَيْعِ أَخِيهِ وَسَوْمِهِ عَلَى سَوْمِهِ وَتَحْرِيمِ النَّجْشِ وَتَحْرِيمِ التَّصْرِيَةِ

chapters.title: The prohibition of intercepting traders
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ تَلَقِّي الْجَلَبِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of the town-dweller selling on behalf of a bedouin
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ بَيْعِ الْحَاضِرِ لِلْبَادِي ‏‏

chapters.title: Ruling on selling Al-Musarrah (An animal in whose udder milk has been allowed to accumulate)
chapters.title_arabic: باب حُكْمِ بَيْعِ الْمُصَرَّاةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: It is invalid to sell goods before taking possession of them
chapters.title_arabic: باب بُطْلاَنِ بَيْعِ الْمَبِيعِ قَبْلَ الْقَبْضِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of selling a heap of dates the weight of which is unknown
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ بَيْعِ صُبْرَةِ التَّمْرِ الْمَجْهُولَةِ الْقَدْرِ بِتَمْرٍ ‏‏

chapters.title: Affirming that both parties to a transaction have the option (of canceling it) while they are still together
chapters.title_arabic: باب ثُبُوتِ خِيَارِ الْمَجْلِسِ لِلْمُتَبَايِعَيْنِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Honesty in selling and disclosure of defects
chapters.title_arabic: باب الصِّدْقِ فِي الْبَيْعِ وَالْبَيَانِ ‏‏

chapters.title: One who is deceived in transactions
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَنْ يُخْدَعُ فِي الْبَيْعِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of selling produce before its goodness appears
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ بَيْعِ الثِّمَارِ، قَبْلَ بُدُوِّ صَلاَحِهَا بِغَيْرِ شَرْطِ الْقَطْعِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of selling fresh dates in exchange for dry dates except in the case of 'Araya
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ بَيْعِ الرُّطَبِ بِالتَّمْرِ إِلاَّ فِي الْعَرَايَا ‏‏

chapters.title: One who sells date palms on which there are dates
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَنْ بَاعَ نَخْلاً عَلَيْهَا ثَمَرٌ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of Muhaqalah and Muzabanah and Mukhabarah: and selling produce before its goodness appears, and Mu'awamah: which is selling years in advance
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْيِ عَنِ الْمُحَاقَلَةِ وَالْمُزَابَنَةِ وَعَنِ الْمُخَابَرَةِ وَبَيْعِ الثَّمَرَةِ قَبْلَ بُدُوِّ صَلاَحِهَا وَعَنْ بَيْعِ الْمُعَاوَمَةِ وَهُوَ بَيْعُ السِّنِينَ

chapters.title: Kira (leasing Land)
chapters.title_arabic: باب كِرَاءِ الأَرْضِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Leasing out Land (Kira) in return for food
chapters.title_arabic: باب كِرَاءِ الأَرْضِ بِالطَّعَامِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Leasing out Land (Kira) for gold and silver
chapters.title_arabic: باب كِرَاءِ الأَرْضِ بِالذَّهَبِ وَالْوَرِقِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Muzura'ah (Sharecropping) and Mu'ajarah
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي الْمُزَارَعَةِ وَالْمُؤَاجَرَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Lending Land
chapters.title_arabic: باب الأَرْضِ تُمْنَحُ ‏‏

chapters.title: Musaqah And Mu'amalah in return for a share of the fruit and crops
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْمُسَاقَاةِ وَالْمُعَامَلَةِ بِجُزْءٍ مِنَ الثَّمَرِ وَالزَّرْعِ

chapters.title: The Virtue of Planting and Cultivating
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْغَرْسِ وَالزَّرْعِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Waiving Payment in the case of Blight
chapters.title_arabic: باب وَضْعِ الْجَوَائِحِ ‏‏

chapters.title: It is recommended to waive debts
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الْوَضْعِ مِنَ الدَّيْنِ

chapters.title: If a man finds what he sold with the purchaser, who has become bankrupt, then he has the right to take it back
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَنْ أَدْرَكَ مَا بَاعَهُ عِنْدَ الْمُشْتَرِي وَقَدْ أَفْلَسَ فَلَهُ الرُّجُوعُ فِيهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The virute of giving more time to one who is suffering difficulty, and letting those go who are suffering difficulty and those who are well off
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ إِنْظَارِ الْمُعْسِرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of a rich man delaying repayment. The validity of Hawalah (Transferal of Debts) and it is recommended to accept transferal of a debt if it is transferred to a rich man
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب تَحْرِيمِ مَطْلِ الْغَنِيِّ وَصِحَّةِ الْحَوَالَةِ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ قَبُولِهَا إِذَا أُحِيلَ عَلَى مَلِيٍّ

chapters.title: The prohibition of selling surplus water which is in the wilderness and is needed to take care of the pasture. The prohibition of not allowing others to use it. The prohibition of Stud fees
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب تَحْرِيمِ بَيْعِ فَضْلِ الْمَاءِ الَّذِي يَكُونُ بِالْفَلَاةِ وَيُحْتَاجُ إِلَيْهِ لِرَعْيِ الْكَلَأِ وَتَحْرِيمِ مَنْعِ بَذْلِهِ وَتَحْرِيمِ بَيْعِ ضِرَابِ الْفَحْلِ

chapters.title: The prohibition of the price of a dog, the fee of a fortuneteller and the payment of a prostitute, and the prohibition of selling cats
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ ثَمَنِ الْكَلْبِ وَحُلْوَانِ الْكَاهِنِ وَمَهْرِ الْبَغِيِّ وَالنَّهْىِ عَنْ بَيْعِ السِّنّ

chapters.title: The command to kill dogs, and its abrogation. The prohibition of keeping dogs, except for hunting, farming, (herding) livestock and the like
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب الْأَمْرِ بِقَتْلِ الْكِلَابِ وَبَيَانِ نَسْخِهِ وَبَيَانِ تَحْرِيمِ اقْتِنَائِهَا إِلَّا لِصَيْدٍ أَوْ زَرْعٍ أَوْ مَاشِيَةٍ وَنَحْوِ ذَلِكَ

chapters.title: The permissibility of a cupper's earnings
chapters.title_arabic: باب حِلِّ أُجْرَةِ الْحِجَامَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of selling wine
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ بَيْعِ الْخَمْرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of selling wine, dead meat, pork and idols
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ بَيْعِ الْخَمْرِ وَالْمَيْتَةِ وَالْخِنْزِيرِ وَالأَصْنَامِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Riba (Usury, Interest)
chapters.title_arabic: باب الرِّبَا ‏‏

chapters.title: Exchange and Selling Gold for Silver on the spot
chapters.title_arabic: باب الصَّرْفِ وَبَيْعِ الذَّهَبِ بِالْوَرِقِ نَقْدًا ‏‏

chapters.title: The Prohibition of selling silver for gold to be paid at a later date
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ بَيْعِ الْوَرِقِ، بِالذَّهَبِ دَيْنًا ‏‏

chapters.title: Selling a necklace in which there are pearls and gold
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيْعِ الْقِلاَدَةِ فِيهَا خَرَزٌ وَذَهَبٌ ‏‏

chapters.title: Selling Food Like for Like
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيْعِ الطَّعَامِ مِثْلاً بِمِثْلٍ ‏‏

chapters.title: Cursing the one who consumes Riba and the one who pays it
chapters.title_arabic: باب لَعْنِ آكِلِ الرِّبَا وَمُؤْكِلِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Taking that which is lawful and leaving that which is unclear
chapters.title_arabic: باب أَخْذِ الْحَلاَلِ وَتَرْكِ الشُّبُهَاتِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Selling Camels and Stipulating that one may ride them
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيْعِ الْبَعِيرِ وَاسْتِثْنَاءِ رُكُوبِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: It is permissible to lend animals and it is recommended to pay in full, giving something better than that which ts owed
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَنِ اسْتَسْلَفَ شَيْئًا فَقَضَى خَيْرًا مِنْهُ وَ ‏"‏ خَيْرُكُمْ أَحْسَنُكُمْ قَضَاءً ‏"‏ ‏‏

chapters.title: The permissibility of selling animals for animals of the same kind and of different quality
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ بَيْعِ الْحَيَوَانِ بِالْحَيَوَانِ مِنْ جِنْسِهِ مُتَفَاضِلاً ‏‏

chapters.title: Pawning (Rahn) and its permissibility whether one is travelling or not
chapters.title_arabic: باب الرَّهْنِ وَجَوَازِهِ فِي الْحَضَرِ وَالسَّفَرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Salam (Payment in Advance)
chapters.title_arabic: باب السَّلَمِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of hoarding staple foods
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الاِحْتِكَارِ فِي الأَقْوَاتِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of swearing oaths when selling
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ الْحَلِفِ، فِي الْبَيْعِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Pre-emption
chapters.title_arabic: باب الشُّفْعَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Fixing a piece of wood to a neighbor's wall
chapters.title_arabic: باب غَرْزِ الْخَشَبِ فِي جِدَارِ الْجَارِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of wrongdoing, seizing land unlawfully etc
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الظُّلْمِ وَغَصْبِ الأَرْضِ وَغَيْرِهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: The width of the road if there is a dispute about it
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَدْرِ الطَّرِيقِ إِذَا اخْتَلَفُوا فِيهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Give The Shares Of Inheritance To Those Who Are Entitled To Them, And Whatever Is Left Goes To The Closest Male Relative
chapters.title_arabic: باب أَلْحِقُوا الْفَرَائِضَ بِأَهْلِهَا فَمَا بَقِيَ فَلأَوْلَى رَجُلٍ ذَكَرٍ ‏‏

chapters.title: Inheritance Of The Kalalah
chapters.title_arabic: باب مِيرَاثِ الْكَلاَلَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Last Verse To Be Revealed Was The Verse Of Kalalah
chapters.title_arabic: باب آخِرِ آيَةٍ أُنْزِلَتْ آيَةُ الْكَلاَلَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Whoever Leaves Behind Wealth, It Is For His Heirs
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَنْ تَرَكَ مَالاً فَلِوَرَثَتِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: It Is Disliked For A Man To Buy What He Gave In Charity From The One To Whom He Gave It
chapters.title_arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ شِرَاءِ الإِنْسَانِ مَا تَصَدَّقَ بِهِ مِمَّنْ تَصَدَّقَ عَلَيْهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Prohibition Of Taking Back One's Charity After It Has Been Accepted, Except In The Case Of What A Father Gives To A Son Or Grandson
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب تَحْرِيمِ الرُّجُوعِ فِي الصَّدَقَةِ وَالْهِبَةِ بَعْدَ الْقَبْضِ إِلَّا مَا وَهَبَهُ لِوَلَدِهِ وَإِنْ سَفَلَ

chapters.title: It Is Disliked To Favor Some Of One's Children Over Others In Gift-Giving
chapters.title_arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ تَفْضِيلِ بَعْضِ الأَوْلاَدِ فِي الْهِبَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The 'Umra (Lifelong Gift)
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْعُمْرَى ‏‏

chapters.title: Bequeathing One-Third
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْوَصِيَّةِ بِالثُّلُثِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Reward For Charity Reaches The Deceased
chapters.title_arabic: باب وُصُولِ ثَوَابِ الصَّدَقَاتِ إِلَى الْمَيِّتِ ‏‏

chapters.title: What Reward Reaches A Man After His Death
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا يَلْحَقُ الإِنْسَانَ مِنَ الثَّوَابِ بَعْدَ وَفَاتِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Waqf (Endowment)
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْوَقْفِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Not Making A Will For One Who Has Nothing To Be Bequeathed
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَرْكِ الْوَصِيَّةِ لِمَنْ لَيْسَ لَهُ شَىْءٌ يُوصِي فِيهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Command To Fulfill Vows
chapters.title_arabic: باب الأَمْرِ بِقَضَاءِ النَّذْرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: he Prohibition Of Vows, And Confirmation That They Do Not Avert Anything
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ النَّذْرِ، وَأَنَّهُ، لاَ يَرُدُّ شَيْئًا ‏‏

chapters.title: There is no fulfillment of a vow that involves disobedience towards Allah, or a vow concerning that which a person does not own
chapters.title_arabic: باب لاَ وَفَاءَ لِنَذْرٍ فِي مَعْصِيَةِ اللَّهِ وَلاَ فِيمَا لاَ يَمْلِكُ الْعَبْدُ ‏‏

chapters.title: One Who Vows To Walk To The Ka'bah
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَنْ نَذَرَ أَنْ يَمْشِيَ إِلَى الْكَعْبَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Expiation For Breaking A Vow
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي كَفَّارَةِ النَّذْرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of swearing by something other than Allah
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ الْحَلِفِ بِغَيْرِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏‏

chapters.title: Whoever swears by Al-Lat and Al-Uzza, let him say La Ilaha Illallah
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَنْ حَلَفَ بِاللاَّتِ وَالْعُزَّى فَلْيَقُلْ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ ‏‏

chapters.title: It is recommended for the one who swears an oath then sees that something else is better than it; To do that which is better and offer expiation for his oath
chapters.title_arabic: باب نَدْبِ مَنْ حَلَفَ يَمِينًا فَرَأَى غَيْرَهَا خَيْرًا مِنْهَا أَنْ يَأْتِيَ الَّذِي هُوَ خَيْرٌ وَيُكَفِّرَ عَنْ يَمِينِهِ

chapters.title: An oath is judged on the intention of the one who asks for it to be sworn.
chapters.title_arabic: باب يَمِينِ الْحَالِفِ عَلَى نِيَّةِ الْمُسْتَحْلِفِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Saying: "If Allah wills" when swearing oaths and at other times
chapters.title_arabic: باب الاِسْتِثْنَاءِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of persisting in an oath that will harm the family of the one who swears it, so long as not persisting in it does not involve anything unlawful
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ الإِصْرَارِ، عَلَى الْيَمِينِ فِيمَا يَتَأَذَّى بِهِ أَهْلُ الْحَالِفِ مِمَّا لَيْسَ بِحَرَامٍ

chapters.title: The vow of a disbeliever, and what he should do about it if he becomes a muslim
chapters.title_arabic: باب نَذْرِ الْكَافِرِ وَمَا يَفْعَلُ فِيهِ إِذَا أَسْلَمَ ‏‏

chapters.title: Treatment of slaves, and the expiation of one who slaps his slave
chapters.title_arabic: باب صُحْبَةِ الْمَمَالِيكِ وَكَفَّارَةِ مَنْ لَطَمَ عَبْدَهُ ‏‏

chapters.title: Stern warning against accusing a slave of fornication
chapters.title_arabic: باب التَّغْلِيظِ عَلَى مَنْ قَذَفَ مَمْلُوكَهُ بِالزِّنَا ‏‏

chapters.title: Feeding a slave what one eats and clothing him as one clothes oneself, and not burdening him with more than he bear
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِطْعَامِ الْمَمْلُوكِ مِمَّا يَأْكُلُ وَإِلْبَاسِهِ مَمَّا يَلْبَسُ وَلاَ يُكَلِّفُهُ مَا يَغْلِبُهُ

chapters.title: The reward of a slave who is sincere towards his master and worships Allah properly
chapters.title_arabic: باب ثَوَابِ الْعَبْدِ وَأَجْرِهِ إِذَا نَصَحَ لِسَيِّدِهِ وَأَحْسَنَ عِبَادَةَ اللَّهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: One who frees his share in a slave
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَنْ أَعْتَقَ شِرْكًا لَهُ فِي عَبْدٍ ‏‏

chapters.title: Permissibility of selling a Mudabbar
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ بَيْعِ الْمُدَبَّرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Qasamah (Oaths)
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْقَسَامَةِ

chapters.title: The ruling on Muharibin and Apostates
chapters.title_arabic: باب حُكْمِ الْمُحَارِبِينَ وَالْمُرْتَدِّينَ ‏‏

chapters.title: Confirmation of Qisas in the case of killing with a rock and other sharp or heavy objects, and the killing of a man for a woman
chapters.title_arabic: باب ثُبُوتِ الْقِصَاصِ فِي الْقَتْلِ بِالْحَجَرِ وَغَيْرِهِ مِنَ الْمُحَدَّدَاتِ وَالْمُثَقَّلاَتِ وَقَتْلِ الرَّجُلِ بِالْمَرْأَةِ

chapters.title: If a person attacks another person's life and limb, and the other defends himself and kills him or injures him, there is no penalty on him
chapters.title_arabic: باب الصَّائِلُ عَلَى نَفْسِ الإِنْسَانِ أَوْ عُضْوِهِ إِذَا دَفَعَهُ الْمَصُولُ عَلَيْهِ فَأَتْلَفَ نَفْسَهُ أَوْ عُضْوَهَ لاَ ضَمَانَ عَلَيْهِ

chapters.title: The validity of Qisas for teeth and the like
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِثْبَاتِ الْقِصَاصِ فِي الأَسْنَانِ وَمَا فِي مَعْنَاهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: When it is permissible to shed the blood of a muslim
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا يُبَاحُ بِهِ دَمُ الْمُسْلِمِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The sin of the one who set the precedent of killing
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ إِثْمِ مَنْ سَنَّ الْقَتْلَ ‏‏

chapters.title: The punishment for bloodshed in the hereafter, and bloodshed will be the first thing concerning which judgement is passed among the people on the Day of Resurrection
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْمُجَازَاةِ بِالدِّمَاءِ فِي الآخِرَةِ وَأَنَّهَا أَوَّلُ مَا يُقْضَى فِيهِ بَيْنَ النَّاسِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ

chapters.title: Emphasis on the sanctity of Blood, Honor and Wealth
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَغْلِيظِ تَحْرِيمِ الدِّمَاءِ وَالأَعْرَاضِ وَالأَمْوَالِ ‏‏

chapters.title: A confession to murder is valid and the heir of the victim is entitled to Qisas, but it is recommended to ask him to let him go
chapters.title_arabic: باب صِحَّةِ الإِقْرَارِ بِالْقَتْلِ وَتَمْكِينِ وَلِيِّ الْقَتِيلِ مِنَ الْقِصَاصِ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ طَلَبِ الْعَفْوِ مِنْهُ

chapters.title: The Diyah for a fetus; and the Diyah for accidental killing and the ambiguous killing must be paid by the shahiqilah of the killer
chapters.title_arabic: باب دِيَةِ الْجَنِينِ وَوُجُوبِ الدِّيَةِ فِي قَتْلِ الْخَطَإِ وَشِبْهِ الْعَمْدِ عَلَى عَاقِلَةِ الْجَانِي

chapters.title: The Hadd for stealing and the minimum threshold
chapters.title_arabic: باب حَدِّ السَّرِقَةِ وَنِصَابِهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: Cutting off the hand of a thief from the nobility and others; the prohibition of interceding with regard to Hudud punishments
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَطْعِ السَّارِقِ الشَّرِيفِ وَغَيْرِهِ وَالنَّهْىِ عَنِ الشَّفَاعَةِ فِي الْحُدُودِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Hadd punishment for Zina (fornication, adultery)
chapters.title_arabic: باب حَدِّ الزِّنَا ‏‏

chapters.title: Stoning of a married person for Zina
chapters.title_arabic: باب رَجْمِ الثَّيِّبِ فِي الزِّنَا ‏‏

chapters.title: One who confesses to Zina
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَنِ اعْتَرَفَ عَلَى نَفْسِهِ بِالزِّنَا ‏‏

chapters.title: Stoning Jews and Ahl Adh-Dhimmah for Zina
chapters.title_arabic: باب رَجْمِ الْيَهُودِ أَهْلِ الذِّمَّةِ فِي الزِّنَا ‏‏

chapters.title: Delaying the Hadd punishment in the case of women who have just given birth
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَأْخِيرِ الْحَدِّ عَنِ النُّفَسَاءِ، ‏‏

chapters.title: Hadd punishment for drinking alcohol
chapters.title_arabic: باب حَدِّ الْخَمْرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Number of lashes in the case of ta'zeer
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَدْرِ أَسْوَاطِ التَّعْزِيرِ

chapters.title: The Hadd punishments are an expiation for those on whom they are carried out
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْحُدُودُ كَفَّارَاتٌ لأَهْلِهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: There is no Diyah for injuries caused by animals or by falling into a mine or well
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَرْحُ الْعَجْمَاءِ وَالْمَعْدِنِ وَالْبِئْرِ جُبَارٌ ‏‏

chapters.title: Oath should be sworn by the defendant
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْيَمِينُ عَلَى الْمُدَّعَى عَلَيْهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The obligation of judging on the basis of a witness and an oath
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْقَضَاءِ بِالْيَمِينِ وَالشَّاهِدِ ‏‏

chapters.title: So the judgement of the judge does not change what happened
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْحُكْمِ بِالظَّاهِرِ وَاللَّحْنِ بِالْحُجَّةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The case of Hind
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَضِيَّةِ هِنْدٍ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of asking too much with no need. The prohibition of withholding the rights of others and asking of them, which means refusing to give others their rights and asking for that to which one is not entitles
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْيِ عَنْ كَثْرَةِ الْمَسَائِلِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَاجَةٍ وَالنَّهْيِ عَنْ مَنْعٍ وَهَاتٍ وَهُوَ الاِمْتِنَاعُ مِنْ أَدَاءِ حَقٍّ لَزِمَهُ أَوْ طَلَبُ مَا لاَ يَسْتَحِقُّهُ

chapters.title: The reward of the judge if he strives to reach a decision, whether he gets it right or wrong
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَجْرِ الْحَاكِمِ إِذَا اجْتَهَدَ فَأَصَابَ أَوْ أَخْطَأَ ‏‏

chapters.title: It is disliked for a judge to pass a judgement when he is angry
chapters.title_arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ قَضَاءِ الْقَاضِي وَهُوَ غَضْبَانُ ‏‏

chapters.title: Rejection of wrong rulings and of newly-invented matters
chapters.title_arabic: باب نَقْضِ الأَحْكَامِ الْبَاطِلَةِ وَرَدِّ مُحْدَثَاتِ الأُمُورِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The best of witnesses
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ خَيْرِ الشُّهُودِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Differences between mujtahids
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ اخْتِلاَفِ الْمُجْتَهِدِينَ ‏‏

chapters.title: It is recommended for a judge to reconcile between disputants
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ إِصْلاَحِ الْحَاكِمِ بَيْنَ الْخَصْمَيْنِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Picking up property lost by a pilgrim
chapters.title_arabic: باب

chapters.title: Milking animals is unlawful if the owner has not given permission
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي لُقَطَةِ الْحَاجِّ ‏‏

chapters.title: Hospitality etc
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ حَلْبِ الْمَاشِيَةِ بِغَيْرِ إِذْنِ مَالِكِهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: It is recommended to spend surplus wealth
chapters.title_arabic: باب الضِّيَافَةِ وَنَحْوِهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: It is recommended to mix provisions if they are few, and to share them out
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الْمُؤَاسَاةِ بِفُضُولِ الْمَالِ ‏‏
باب اسْتِحْبَابِ خَلْطِ الأَزْوَادِ إِذَا قَلَّتْ وَالْمُؤَاسَاةِ فِيهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: Permissibility of raiding the Kuffar, who have been reached with the call of Islam, without giving prior warning
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ الإِغَارَةِ عَلَى الْكُفَّارِ الَّذِينَ بَلَغَتْهُمْ دَعْوَةُ الإِسْلاَمِ مِنْ غَيْرِ تَقَدُّمِ الإِعْلاَمِ بِالإِغَارَةِ

chapters.title: Ruler appointing leaders of expeditions and advising them of the etiquette of war, etc.
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَأْمِيرِ الإِمَامِ الأُمَرَاءَ عَلَى الْبُعُوثِ وَوَصِيَّتِهِ إِيَّاهُمْ بِآدَابِ الْغَزْوِ وَغَيْرِهَا

chapters.title: The command to show leniency and avoid causing aversion (towards Islam)
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي الأَمْرِ بِالتَّيْسِيرِ وَتَرْكِ التَّنْفِيرِ

chapters.title: The prohibition of betrayal
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الْغَدْرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Permissibility of deceit in war
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ الْخِدَاعِ فِي الْحَرْبِ ‏‏

chapters.title: It is disliked to wish to meet the enemy, and the command to be steadfast when meeting the enemy
chapters.title_arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ تَمَنِّي لِقَاءِ الْعَدُوِّ وَالأَمْرِ بِالصَّبْرِ عِنْدَ اللِّقَاءِ ‏‏

chapters.title: It is recommended to pray for victory when meeting the enemy
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الدُّعَاءِ بِالنَّصْرِ عِنْدَ لِقَاءِ الْعَدُوِّ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of killing women and children in war
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ قَتْلِ النِّسَاءِ وَالصِّبْيَانِ فِي الْحَرْبِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Permissibility of killing women and children in night raids, so long as it is not done deliberately
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ قَتْلِ النِّسَاءِ وَالصِّبْيَانِ فِي الْبَيَاتِ مِنْ غَيْرِ تَعَمُّدٍ ‏‏

chapters.title: Permissibility of cutting down the trees of the Kuffar and burning them
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ قَطْعِ أَشْجَارِ الْكُفَّارِ وَتَحْرِيقِهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: War booty has been made permissible for this Ummah only
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْلِيلِ الْغَنَائِمِ لِهَذِهِ الأُمَّةِ خَاصَّةً ‏‏

chapters.title: Spoils of War
chapters.title_arabic: باب الأَنْفَالِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The killer is entitled to the belongings of the one who is killed
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْقَاقِ الْقَاتِلِ سَلَبَ الْقَتِيلِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Additional rewards, and ransoming muslims in return for prisoners
chapters.title_arabic: باب التَّنْفِيلِ وَفِدَاءِ الْمُسْلِمِينَ بِالأَسَارَى ‏‏

chapters.title: Ruling on Fai' (Booty acquired without fighting)
chapters.title_arabic: باب حُكْمِ الْفَىْءِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The words of the Prophet (saws): "We (Prophets) have no heirs and whatever we leave behind is charity."
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ لاَ نُورَثُ مَا تَرَكْنَا فَهُوَ صَدَقَةٌ ‏"‏ ‏‏

chapters.title: How booty is to be shared among the fighters
chapters.title_arabic: باب كَيْفِيَّةِ قِسْمَةِ الْغَنِيمَةِ بَيْنَ الْحَاضِرِينَ ‏‏

chapters.title: The support of the angels during the Battle of Badr, and the permissibility of the spoils
