chapters.title_arabic: باب الإِمْدَادِ بِالْمَلاَئِكَةِ فِي غَزْوَةِ بَدْرٍ وَإِبَاحَةِ الْغَنَائِمِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Tying up and detaining captives, and the permissibility of releasing them without a ransom
chapters.title_arabic: باب رَبْطِ الأَسِيرِ وَحَبْسِهِ وَجَوَازِ الْمَنِّ عَلَيْهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Expulsion of the Jews from the Hijaz
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِجْلاَءِ الْيَهُودِ مِنَ الْحِجَازِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Expulsion of Jews and Christians from the Arabian Peninsula
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِخْرَاجِ الْيَهُودِ وَالنَّصَارَى مِنْ جَزِيرَةِ الْعَرَبِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Permissibility of fighting those who break a treaty; Permissibility of letting besieged people surrender, subject to the judgement of a just person who is qualified to pass judgement
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ قِتَالِ مَنْ نَقَضَ الْعَهْدَ وَجَوَازِ إِنْزَالِ أَهْلِ الْحِصْنِ عَلَى حُكْمِ حَاكِمٍ عَدْلٍ أَهْلٍ لِلْحُكْمِ

chapters.title: Hastening to fight, and giving precedence to the more urgent of two tasks when a choice must be made
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَنْ لَزِمَهُ أَمْرٌ فَدَخَلَ عَلَيْهِ أَمْرٌ آخَرُ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Muhajirun returned to the Ansar the gifts of trees and fruits when they became independent of means through the conquests
chapters.title_arabic: باب رَدِّ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ إِلَى الأَنْصَارِ مَنَائِحَهُمْ مِنَ الشَّجَرِ وَالثَّمَرِ حِينَ اسْتَغْنَوْا عَنْهَا بِالْفُتُوحِ

chapters.title: Permissibility of eating food seized as booty in Dar Al-Harb
chapters.title_arabic: باب أَخْذِ الطَّعَامِ مِنْ أَرْضِ الْعَدُوِّ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Prophet (saws) wrote to Heraclius, the ruler of Syria, inviting him to Islam
chapters.title_arabic: باب كِتَابِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم إِلَى هِرَقْلَ يَدْعُوهُ إِلَى الإِسْلاَمِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Prophet (saws) wrote to the Kings of the Kuffar, inviting them to Islam
chapters.title_arabic: باب كُتُبِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم إِلَى مُلُوكِ الْكُفَّارِ يَدْعُوهُمْ إِلَى اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ

chapters.title: The Battle of Hunain
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي غَزْوَةِ حُنَيْنٍ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Battle of At-Ta'if
chapters.title_arabic: باب غَزْوَةِ الطَّائِفِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Battle of Badr
chapters.title_arabic: باب غَزْوَةِ بَدْرٍ ‏‏

chapters.title: The conquest of Makkah
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَتْحِ مَكَّةَ ‏‏

chapters.title: Removal of Idols from around the Ka'bah
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِزَالَةِ الأَصْنَامِ مِنْ حَوْلِ الْكَعْبَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: No man if Quraish is to be captured then killed, after the conquest
chapters.title_arabic: باب لاَ يُقْتَلُ قُرَشِيٌّ صَبْرًا بَعْدَ الْفَتْحِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The truce of Al-Hudaybiyah
chapters.title_arabic: باب صُلْحِ الْحُدَيْبِيَةِ فِي الْحُدَيْبِيَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Upholding Covenants
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْوَفَاءِ بِالْعَهْدِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Battle of Al-Ahzab (The Confederates)
chapters.title_arabic: باب غَزْوَةِ الأَحْزَابِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Battle of Uhud
chapters.title_arabic: باب غَزْوَةِ أُحُدٍ ‏‏

chapters.title: The intense wrath of Allah towards the one who was killed by the messenger of Allah (saws)
chapters.title_arabic: باب اشْتِدَادِ غَضَبِ اللَّهِ عَلَى مَنْ قَتَلَهُ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏‏

chapters.title: The persecution suffered by the prophet (saws) at the hands of the idolaters and hypocrites
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا لَقِيَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم مِنْ أَذَى الْمُشْرِكِينَ وَالْمُنَافِقِينَ ‏‏

chapters.title: The supplication of the Prophet (saws) and his steadfastness in the face of the hypocrites' persecution
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي دُعَاءِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم إِلَى اللَّهِ وَصَبْرِهِ عَلَى أَذَى الْمُنَافِقِينَ

chapters.title: The slaying of Abu Jahl
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَتْلِ أَبِي جَهْلٍ ‏‏

chapters.title: The slaying of Ka'b Bin Al-Ashraf, the Tagut of the Jews
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَتْلِ كَعْبِ بْنِ الأَشْرَفِ طَاغُوتِ الْيَهُودِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Battle of Khaibar
chapters.title_arabic: باب غَزْوَةِ خَيْبَرَ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Battle of Al-Ahzab (The Confederates), also known as Al-Khandaq (The Ditch)
chapters.title_arabic: باب غَزْوَةِ الأَحْزَابِ وَهِيَ الْخَنْدَقُ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Battle of Dhu Qarad and other battles
chapters.title_arabic: باب غَزْوَةِ ذِي قَرَدٍ وَغَيْرِهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: The words of Allah, the Most High: "And He it is who has withheld their hands from you"
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: <qref chapter="48" verses="24">{وَهُوَ الَّذِي كَفَّ أَيْدِيَهُمْ عَنْكُمْ}</qref> الآيَةَ:

chapters.title: Women participating in military expeditions with the men
chapters.title_arabic: باب غَزْوَةِ النِّسَاءِ مَعَ الرِّجَالِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Women who take part in military expeditions are to be given a reward but not a regular share; And the prohibition of killing children of the enemy
chapters.title_arabic: باب النِّسَاءُ الْغَازِيَاتُ يُرْضَخُ لَهُنَّ وَلاَ يُسْهَمُ وَالنَّهْىُ عَنْ قَتْلِ صِبْيَانِ أَهْلِ الْحَرْبِ

chapters.title: The number of campaigns of the Prophet (saws)
chapters.title_arabic: باب عَدَدِ غَزَوَاتِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم

chapters.title: The campaign of Dhat Ar-Riqa
chapters.title_arabic: باب غَزْوَةِ ذَاتِ الرِّقَاعِ

chapters.title: It is disliked to seek the help of a disbeliever in wars (except in cases of necessity, or if he thinks well of the Muslims)
chapters.title_arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ الاِسْتِعَانَةِ فِي الْغَزْوِ بِكَافِرٍ

chapters.title: The people follow the Quraish and the Caliphate belongs to the Quraish
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّاسُ تَبَعٌ لِقُرَيْشٍ وَالْخِلاَفَةُ فِي قُرَيْشٍ ‏‏

chapters.title: Appointing a successor or not doing so
chapters.title_arabic: باب الاِسْتِخْلاَفِ وَتَرْكِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of seeking or desiring a position of authority
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ طَلَبِ الإِمَارَةِ، وَالْحِرْصِ، عَلَيْهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: It is disliked to be appointed to a position of authority unnecessarily
chapters.title_arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ الإِمَارَةِ بِغَيْرِ ضَرُورَةٍ ‏‏

chapters.title: The virtue of a just ruler and the punishment of a tyrant; Encouragement to treat those under one's authority with kindness and the prohibition against causing them hardship
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضِيلَةِ الإِمَامِ الْعَادِلِ وَعُقُوبَةِ الْجَائِرِ وَالْحَثِّ عَلَى الرِّفْقِ بِالرَّعِيَّةِ وَالنَّهْيِ عَنْ إِدْخَالِ الْمَشَقَّةِ عَلَيْهِمْ

chapters.title: Emphatic prohibition against stealing from the spoils of war (Ghulul)
chapters.title_arabic: باب غِلَظِ تَحْرِيمِ الْغُلُولِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of giving gifts to agents
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ هَدَايَا الْعُمَّالِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The obligation of obeying leaders in matters that do not involve sin, but it is forbidden to obey them in sinful matters
chapters.title_arabic: باب وُجُوبِ طَاعَةِ الأُمَرَاءِ فِي غَيْرِ مَعْصِيَةٍ وَتَحْرِيمِهَا فِي الْمَعْصِيَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The ruler is a shield from behind whom they fight and by whom they are protected
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي الإِمَامِ إِذَا أَمَرَ بِتَقْوَى اللَّهِ وَعَدَلَ كَانَ لَهُ أَجْرٌ ‏‏

chapters.title: The obligation of fulfilling oaths of allegiance is owed to the first of two Caliphs
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْوَفَاءِ بِبَيْعَةِ الْخُلَفَاءِ الأَوَّلِ فَالأَوَّلِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The command to be patient in the face of oppressive rulers and their selfishness
chapters.title_arabic: باب الأَمْرِ بِالصَّبْرِ عِنْدَ ظُلْمِ الْوُلاَةِ وَاسْتِئْثَارِهِمْ ‏‏

chapters.title: Obeying Rulers even if they withhold the people's rights
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي طَاعَةِ الأُمَرَاءِ وَإِنْ مَنَعُوا الْحُقُوقَ

chapters.title: The obligation of staying with the Jama'ah (main body) of the muslims when Fitn (tribulations) appear, and in all circumstances. The prohibition of refusing to obey and on splitting away from the Jama'ah
chapters.title_arabic: باب الأَمْرِ بِلُزُومِ الْجَمَاعَةِ عِنْدَ ظُهُورِ الْفِتَنِ وَتَحْذِيرِ الدُّعَاةِ إِلَى الْكُفْرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The ruling on one who seeks to divide the muslims when they are united
chapters.title_arabic: باب حُكْمِ مَنْ فَرَّقَ أَمْرَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ وَهُوَ مُجْتَمِعٌ ‏‏

chapters.title: When allegiance has been sworn to two caliphs
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِذَا بُويِعَ لِخَلِيفَتَيْنِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The obligation to denounce rulers for that in which they go against Shari'ah, but they should not be fought so long as they pray regularly, etc
chapters.title_arabic: باب وُجُوبِ الإِنْكَارِ عَلَى الأُمَرَاءِ فِيمَا يُخَالِفُ الشَّرْعَ وَتَرْكِ قِتَالِهِمْ مَا صَلَّوْا وَنَحْوِ ذَلِكَ

chapters.title: The best and worst of rulers
chapters.title_arabic: باب خِيَارِ الأَئِمَّةِ وَشِرَارِهِمْ ‏‏

chapters.title: It is recommended for the army to swear allegiance to the ruler when intending to fight, and an account of Bay'at Ar-Ridwan beneath the tree
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ مُبَايَعَةِ الإِمَامِ الْجَيْشَ عِنْدَ إِرَادَةِ الْقِتَالِ وَبَيَانِ بَيْعَةِ الرِّضْوَانِ تَحْتَ الشَّجَرَةِ

chapters.title: The prohibition against a Muhajir returning to settle in his former homeland
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ رُجُوعِ الْمُهَاجِرِ إِلَى اسْتِيطَانِ وَطَنِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Swearing Allegiance and Pledging to adhere to Islam, to engage in Jihad and to do Good, after the conquest of Makkah, and the meaning of the phrase: "There is No Hijrah (migration) after the Conquest."
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْمُبَايَعَةِ بَعْدَ فَتْحِ مَكَّةَ عَلَى الإِسْلاَمِ وَالْجِهَادِ وَالْخَيْرِ وَبَيَانِ مَعْنَى: «لاَ هِجْرَةَ بَعْدَ الْفَتْحِ»

chapters.title: How women gave their oath of allegiance
chapters.title_arabic: باب كَيْفِيَّةِ بَيْعَةِ النِّسَاءِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Oath of allegiance pledging to hear and obey as much as possible
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْبَيْعَةِ عَلَى السَّمْعِ وَالطَّاعَةِ فِيمَا اسْتَطَاعَ ‏‏

chapters.title: The age of responsibility
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ سِنِّ الْبُلُوغِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of travelling with the Mushaf to the land of the disbelievers if there is the fear that it may fall into their hands.
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ أَنْ يُسَافَرَ بِالْمُصْحَفِ إِلَى أَرْضِ الْكُفَّارِ إِذَا خِيفَ وُقُوعُهُ بِأَيْدِيهِمْ

chapters.title: Horse Races and Training Horses for Racing
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْمُسَابَقَةِ بَيْنَ الْخَيْلِ وَتَضْمِيرِهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: The virtue of horses; "Goodness is tied to their Forelocks."
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْخَيْلُ فِي نَوَاصِيهَا الْخَيْرُ إِلَى يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Disliked qualities in Horses
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنْ صِفَاتِ الْخَيْلِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The virtue of Jihad and going out (to fight) in the cause of Allah
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْجِهَادِ وَالْخُرُوجِ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The virtue of Martyrdom in the cause of Allah
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ الشَّهَادَةِ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏‏

chapters.title: The virtue of going out in the morning or the evening in the cause of Allah
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْغَدْوَةِ وَالرَّوْحَةِ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The High Positions that Allah has prepared for the Mujahid in Paradise
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ مَا أَعَدَّهُ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى لِلْمُجَاهِدِ فِي الْجَنَّةِ مِنَ الدَّرَجَاتِ ‏‏

chapters.title: If a person is killed in the cause of Allah, all his sins will be expiated except debt
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَنْ قُتِلَ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ كُفِّرَتْ خَطَايَاهُ إِلاَّ الدَّيْنَ ‏‏

chapters.title: The souls of the martyrs are in Paradise, and they are alive with their Lord and they have provision
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي بَيَانِ أَنَّ أَرْوَاحَ الشُّهَدَاءِ فِي الْجَنَّةِ وَأَنَّهُمْ أَحْيَاءٌ عِنْدَ رَبِّهِمْ يُرْزَقُونَ

chapters.title: The virtue of Jihad and keeping watch over the frontier
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْجِهَادِ وَالرِّبَاطِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Two Men, one of whom kills the other, and both will enter Paradise
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ الرَّجُلَيْنِ يَقْتُلُ أَحَدُهُمَا الآخَرَ يَدْخُلاَنِ الْجَنَّةَ ‏‏

chapters.title: One who kills a disbeliever then keeps to the right path
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَنْ قَتَلَ كَافِرًا ثُمَّ سَدَّدَ ‏‏

chapters.title: The virtue of Charity in the Cause of Allah, and its Manifold reward
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ الصَّدَقَةِ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ وَتَضْعِيفِهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: The virtue of helping the warrior who is fighting in the cause of Allah with mounts etc., and looking after his family in his absence
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ إِعَانَةِ الْغَازِي فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ بِمَرْكُوبٍ وَغَيْرِهِ وَخِلاَفَتِهِ فِي أَهْلِهِ بِخَيْرٍ

chapters.title: The sanctity of the wives of the Mujahidin, and the sin of the one who betrays them with regard to them
chapters.title_arabic: باب حُرْمَةِ نِسَاءِ الْمُجَاهِدِينَ وَإِثْمِ مَنْ خَانَهُمْ فِيهِنَّ ‏‏

chapters.title: The duty of Jihad is waived for those who have excuses
chapters.title_arabic: باب سُقُوطِ فَرْضِ الْجِهَادِ عَنِ الْمَعْذُورِينَ، ‏‏

chapters.title: Affirmation of Paradise for the Martyr
chapters.title_arabic: باب ثُبُوتِ الْجَنَّةِ لِلشَّهِيدِ ‏‏

chapters.title: One who fights so that the word of Allah will be supreme is fighting in the cause of Allah
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَنْ قَاتَلَ لِتَكُونَ كَلِمَةُ اللَّهِ هِيَ الْعُلْيَا فَهُوَ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: One who fights to show off and gain a reputation deserves Hell
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَنَ قَاتَلَ لِلرِّيَاءِ وَالسُّمْعَةِ اسْتَحَقَّ النَّارَ ‏‏

chapters.title: The reward of those who fought and acquired spoils of war and those who did not acquire spoils of war
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ قَدْرِ ثَوَابِ مَنْ غَزَا فَغَنِمَ وَمَنْ لَمْ يَغْنَمْ ‏‏

chapters.title: The words of the prophets saws: "Deeds are but with intentions" which includes fighting and other deeds
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ إِنَّمَا الأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّةِ.‏"‏ وَأَنَّهُ يَدْخُلُ فِيهِ الْغَزْوُ وَغَيْرُهُ مِنَ الأَعْمَالِ

chapters.title: It is recommended to seek Martyrdom in the Cause of Allah, Exalted is He.
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ طَلَبِ الشَّهَادَةِ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏‏

chapters.title: Criticism of one who dies without having fought (in Jihad) or having thought of fighting
chapters.title_arabic: باب ذَمِّ مَنْ مَاتَ وَلَمْ يَغْزُ وَلَمْ يُحَدِّثْ نَفْسَهُ بِالْغَزْوِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The reward of one who is kept from fighting by sickness or any other excuse
chapters.title_arabic: باب ثَوَابِ مَنْ حَبَسَهُ عَنِ الْغَزْوِ، مَرَضٌ أَوْ عُذْرٌ آخَرُ ‏‏

chapters.title: The virtue of campaigning by sea
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْغَزْوِ فِي الْبَحْرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The virtue of guarding the frontier in the cause of Allah (Glorified and Exalted is He)
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ الرِّبَاطِ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ ‏‏

chapters.title: About the Martyrs
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ الشُّهَدَاءِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The virtue of Shooting and Encouragement to learn it, and criticism of the one who learns it and then forgets it
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ الرَّمْىِ وَالْحَثِّ عَلَيْهِ وَذَمِّ مَنْ عَلِمَهُ ثُمَّ نَسِيَهُ ‏‏

chapters.title: The words of the prophet saws: "A Group of my Ummah will continue to Prevail on the basis of the Truth, and They will not be Harmed by those who oppose them."
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «لاَ تَزَالُ طَائِفَةٌ مِنْ أُمَّتِي ظَاهِرِينَ عَلَى الْحَقِّ لاَ يَضُرُّهُمْ مَنْ خَالَفَهُمْ»

chapters.title: Keeping animals' well being in mind when traveling, and the prohibition of halting in the road at the end of the night.
chapters.title_arabic: باب مُرَاعَاةِ مَصْلَحَةِ الدَّوَابِّ فِي السَّيْرِ وَالنَّهْىِ عَنِ التَّعْرِيسِ فِي الطَّرِيقِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Travel is a kind of torment, and it is recommended for the traveler to hasten back to his family after finishing his business
chapters.title_arabic: باب السَّفَرِ قِطْعَةٌ مِنَ الْعَذَابِ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ تَعْجِيلِ الْمُسَافِرِ إِلَى أَهْلِهِ بَعْدَ قَضَاءِ شُغْلِهِ

chapters.title: It is disliked to enter at night when coming home from a journey
chapters.title_arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ الطُّرُوقِ وَهُوَ الدُّخُولُ لَيْلاً لِمَنْ وَرَدَ مِنْ سَفَرٍ ‏‏

chapters.title: Hunting with trained dogs and arrows
chapters.title_arabic: باب الصَّيْدِ بِالْكِلاَبِ الْمُعَلَّمَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: If the game disappears, then is found afterwards
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِذَا غَابَ عَنْهُ الصَّيْدُ ثُمَّ وَجَدَهُ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of eating any wild animal with Fangs and any bird with Talons
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ أَكْلِ كُلِّ ذِي نَابٍ مِنَ السِّبَاعِ وَكُلِّ ذِي مِخْلَبٍ مِنَ الطَّيْرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Permissibility of dead animals from the sea
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِبَاحَةِ مَيْتَاتِ الْبَحْرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of eating the meat of domesticated donkeys
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ أَكْلِ لَحْمِ الْحُمُرِ الإِنْسِيَّةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The permissibility of eating horse meat
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي أَكْلِ لُحُومِ الْخَيْلِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The permissibility of eating the Dabb (mastigure)
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِبَاحَةِ الضَّبِّ ‏‏

chapters.title: The permissibility of eating Locusts
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِبَاحَةِ الْجَرَادِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The permissibility of eating Rabbit
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِبَاحَةِ الأَرْنَبِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The permissibility of using things that help in hunting and pursuing the enemy, but throwing small pebbles is disliked
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِبَاحَةِ مَا يُسْتَعَانُ بِهِ عَلَى الاِصْطِيَادِ وَالْعَدُوِّ وَكَرَاهَةِ الْخَذْفِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The command to be proficient in slaughtering and killing, and to sharpen the blade
chapters.title_arabic: باب الأَمْرِ بِإِحْسَانِ الذَّبْحِ وَالْقَتْلِ وَتَحْدِيدِ الشَّفْرَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of cornering animals in order to kill them (for sport)
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ صَبْرِ الْبَهَائِمِ، ‏‏

chapters.title: The time for sacrifice
chapters.title_arabic: باب وَقْتِهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: The age of sacrificial animals
chapters.title_arabic: باب سِنِّ الأُضْحِيَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: It is recommended to select a good animal for the sacrifice and to slaughter it oneself, not delegating it to anyone else, and to say the name of Allah, and to say the Takbir
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الضَّحِيَّةِ وَذَبْحِهَا مُبَاشَرَةً بِلاَ تَوْكِيلٍ وَالتَّسْمِيَةِ وَالتَّكْبِيرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The permissibility of slaughtering with anything that makes the blood flow, except teeth and other bones
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ الذَّبْحِ بِكُلِّ مَا أَنْهَرَ الدَّمَ إِلاَّ السِّنَّ وَالظُّفُرَ وَسَائِرَ الْعِظَامِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of eating sacrificial meat for more than three days, which applied at the beginning of Islam but was then abrogated, and now it is permissible to eat it as long as one wants.
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ مَا كَانَ مِنَ النَّهْىِ عَنْ أَكْلِ لُحُومِ الأَضَاحِيِّ بَعْدَ ثَلاَثٍ فِي أَوَّلِ الإِسْلاَمِ وَبَيَانِ نَسْخِهِ وَإِبَاحَتِهِ إِلَى مَتَى شَاءَ

chapters.title: Fara' and 'Atirah
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْفَرَعِ وَالْعَتِيرَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: When the first ten days of Dhul-Hijjah begin, it is forbidden for the one who wants to offer a sacrifice to remove anything from his hair, nails or skin
chapters.title_arabic: باب نَهْيِ مَنْ دَخَلَ عَلَيْهِ عَشْرُ ذِي الْحِجَّةِ وَهُوَ مُرِيدُ التَّضْحِيَةِ أَنْ يَأْخُذَ مِنْ شَعْرِهِ أَوْ أَظْفَارِهِ شَيْئًا

chapters.title: The prohibition of slaughtering a sacrifice for anything other than Allah, and the one who does that is cursed
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الذَّبْحِ لِغَيْرِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى وَلَعْنِ فَاعِلِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of Khamr, which may be made from the juice of grapes, dried dates, unripe dates, raisins and other things that intoxicate
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الْخَمْرِ وَبَيَانِ أَنَّهَا تَكُونُ مِنْ عَصِيرِ الْعِنَبِ وَمِنَ التَّمْرِ وَالْبُسْرِ وَالزَّبِيبِ وَغَيْرِهَا مِمَّا يُسْكِرُ

chapters.title: The prohibition of making vinegar from wine
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ تَخْلِيلِ الْخَمْرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of using Khamr as a remedy; It is not a remedy
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ التَّدَاوِي بِالْخَمْرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Everything that is taken from the date palm or grape vine and steeped is called Khamr
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ جَمِيعَ مَا يُنْبَذُ مِمَّا يُتَّخَذُ مِنَ النَّخْلِ وَالْعِنَبِ يُسَمَّى خَمْرًا ‏‏

chapters.title: It is disliked to make Nabidh by mixing dried dates and raisins
chapters.title_arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ انْتِبَاذِ التَّمْرِ وَالزَّبِيبِ مَخْلُوطَيْنِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of making Nabidh in Al-Muzaffat, Ad-Dubba' (Gourds), Al-Hantam and An-Naqir; This has been abrogated and now it is permitted, so long as it does not become intoxicating
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْيِ عَنْ الاِنْتِبَاذِ فِي الْمُزَفَّتِ وَالدُّبَّاءِ وَالْحَنْتَمِ وَالنَّقِيرِ وَبَيَانِ أَنَّهُ مَنْسُوخٌ وَأَنَّهُ الْيَوْمَ حَلاَلٌ مَا لَمْ يَصِرْ مُسْكِرًا

chapters.title: Every intoxicant is Khamr and all Khamr is Haram
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّ كُلَّ مُسْكِرٍ خَمْرٌ وَأَنَّ كُلَّ خَمْرٍ حَرَامٌ ‏‏

chapters.title: The punishment of one who drinks Khamr if he does not repent from it: he will be denied it in the hereafter
chapters.title_arabic: باب عُقُوبَةِ مَنْ شَرِبَ الْخَمْرَ إِذَا لَمْ يَتُبْ مِنْهَا بِمَنْعِهِ إِيَّاهَا فِي الآخِرَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The permissibility of Nabidh so long as it has not become strong and has not become intoxicating
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِبَاحَةِ النَّبِيذِ الَّذِي لَمْ يَشْتَدَّ وَلَمْ يَصِرْ مُسْكِرًا ‏‏

chapters.title: The permissibility of drinking milk
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ شُرْبِ اللَّبَنِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Drinking Nabidh and covering vessels
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي شُرْبِ النَّبِيذِ وَتَخْمِيرِ الإِنَاءِ ‏‏

chapters.title: It is recommended to cover vessels, tie up waterskins, close doors and mention the name of Allah over them, extinguish lamps and fires when going to sleep, and keep children and animals in after maghrib
chapters.title_arabic: باب الأَمْرِ بِتَغْطِيَةِ الإِنَاءِ وَإِيكَاءِ السِّقَاءِ وَإِغْلاَقِ الأَبْوَابِ وَذِكْرِ اسْمِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهَا وَإِطْفَاءِ السِّرَاجِ وَالنَّارِ عِنْدَ النَّوْمِ وَكَفِّ الصِّبْيَانِ وَالْمَوَاشِي بَعْدَ الْمَغْرِبِ

chapters.title: The etiquette of eating and drinking, and rulings thereon
chapters.title_arabic: باب آدَابِ الطَّعَامِ وَالشَّرَابِ وَأَحْكَامِهِمَا ‏‏

chapters.title: Drinking while standing
chapters.title_arabic: باب كَرَاهِيَةِ الشُّرْبِ قَائِمًا ‏‏

chapters.title: Drinking zamzam water while standing
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي الشُّرْبِ مِنْ زَمْزَمَ قَائِمًا ‏‏

chapters.title: It is disliked to breathe into the vessel, and it is recommended to take three breaths, outside the vessel
chapters.title_arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ التَّنَفُّسِ فِي نَفْسِ الإِنَاءِ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ التَّنَفُّسِ ثَلاَثًا خَارِجَ الإِنَاءِ

chapters.title: It is recommended to pass water and milk etc., to the right of the one who drinks first
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ إِدَارَةِ الْمَاءِ وَاللَّبَنِ وَنَحْوِهِمَا عَنْ يَمِينِ الْمُبْتَدِئِ ‏‏

chapters.title: It is recommended to lick one's fingers and wipe the bowl, and to eat a piece of food that is dropped after removing any dirt on it. It is disliked to wipe one's hand before licking it, because of the possibility that the blessing of the food may be in that remaining part. The Sunnah is to eat with three fingers
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ لَعْقِ الأَصَابِعِ وَالْقَصْعَةِ وَأَكْلِ اللُّقْمَةِ السَّاقِطَةِ بَعْدَ مَسْحِ مَا يُصِيبُهَا مِنْ أَذًى وَكَرَاهَةِ مَسْحِ الْيَدِ قَبْلَ لَعْقِهَا

chapters.title: What the guest should do if he is accompanied by someone who was not invited by the host; it is recommended for the host to give permission to the one who has accompanied the guest
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا يَفْعَلُ الضَّيْفُ إِذَا تَبِعَهُ غَيْرُ مَنْ دَعَاهُ صَاحِبُ الطَّعَامِ وَاسْتِحْبَابُ إِذْنِ صَاحِبِ الطَّعَامِ لِلتَّابِعِ

chapters.title: It is permissible to take someone else to the house of one who you are certain will approve of that and will not mind. It is recommended to gather to eat
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ اسْتِتْبَاعِهِ غَيْرَهُ إِلَى دَارِ مَنْ يَثِقُ بِرِضَاهُ بِذَلِكَ وَيَتَحَقَّقُهُ تَحَقُّقًا تَامًّا وَاسْتِحْبَابِ الاِجْتِمَاعِ عَلَى الطَّعَامِ

chapters.title: It is permissible to eat soup, and it is recommended to eat squash, And for the people eating together to show preference to one another even if they are guests, so long as the host does not object to that
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ أَكْلِ الْمَرَقِ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ أَكْلِ الْيَقْطِينِ وَإِيثَارِ أَهْلِ الْمَائِدَةِ بَعْضِهِمْ بَعْضًا وَإِنْ كَانُوا ضِيفَانًا إِذَا لَمْ يَكْرَهْ ذَلِكَ صَاحِبُ الطَّعَامِ

chapters.title: It is recommended to take the stones out of dates, and it is recommended for the guest to pray for the host and to ask a righteous guest to supplicate, and he should respond to that request
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ وَضْعِ النَّوَى خَارِجَ التَّمْرِ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ دُعَاءِ الضَّيْفِ لأَهْلِ الطَّعَامِ وَطَلَبِ الدُّعَاءِ مِنَ الضَّيْفِ الصَّالِحِ وَإِجَابَتِهِ لِذَلِكَ

chapters.title: Eating cucumbers with fresh dates
chapters.title_arabic: باب أَكْلِ الْقِثَّاءِ بِالرُّطَبِ ‏‏

chapters.title: It is recommended to be humble when eating, and how to sit
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ تَوَاضُعِ الآكِلِ وَصِفَةِ قُعُودِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The prohibition of eating two dates etc., at a time when eating with a group, except with the permission of one's companions
chapters.title_arabic: باب نَهْيِ الآكِلِ مَعَ جَمَاعَةٍ عَنْ قِرَانِ تَمْرَتَيْنِ وَنَحْوِهِمَا فِي لُقْمَةٍ إِلاَّ بِإِذْنِ أَصْحَابِهِ

chapters.title: Storing dates and other provisions for one's children
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي ادْخَالِ التَّمْرِ وَنَحْوِهِ مِنَ الأَقْوَاتِ لِلْعِيَالِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The virtue of the dates of Al-Madinah
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ تَمْرِ الْمَدِينَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The virtue of truffles, and treating the eyes with them
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْكَمْأَةِ وَمُدَاوَاةِ الْعَيْنِ بِهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: The virtue of the black fruit from the Arak tree
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضِيلَةِ الأَسْوَدِ مِنَ الْكَبَاثِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The virtue of vinegar and using it as a condiment
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضِيلَةِ الْخَلِّ وَالتَّأَدُّمِ بِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: It is permissible to eat garlic, but the one who is going to address prominent people should refrain from eating it, and the same applies to other, similar foods
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِبَاحَةِ أَكْلِ الثُّومِ وَأَنَّهُ يَنْبَغِي لِمَنْ أَرَادَ خِطَابِ الْكِبَارِ تَرْكُهُ وَكَذَا مَا فِي مَعْنَاهُ

chapters.title: Honoring guests and the virtue of showing preference to one's guest
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِكْرَامِ الضَّيْفِ وَفَضْلِ إِيثَارِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The virtue of sharing a small amount of food, and the food of two is sufficient for three, and so on.
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضِيلَةِ الْمُوَاسَاةِ فِي الطَّعَامِ الْقَلِيلِ وَأَنَّ طَعَامَ الاِثْنَيْنِ يَكْفِي الثَّلاَثَةَ وَنَحْوِ ذَلِكَ

chapters.title: The believer eats in one intestine and the disbeliever eats in seven intestines.
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْمُؤْمِنُ يَأْكُلُ فِي مِعًى وَاحِدٍ وَالْكَافِرُ يَأْكُلُ فِي سَبْعَةِ أَمْعَاءٍ ‏‏

chapters.title: Do not criticize food
chapters.title_arabic: باب لاَ يَعِيبُ الطَّعَامَ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Prohibition Of Using Vessels Of Gold And Silver For Drinking Etc., For Men And Women
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ أَوَانِي الذَّهَبِ وَالْفِضَّةِ فِي الشُّرْبِ وَغَيْرِهِ عَلَى الرِّجَالِ وَالنِّسَاءِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Prohibition Of Using Vessels Of Gold And Silver For Men And Women, And Gold Rings And Silk For Men, But They Are Permissible For Women. Permissibility Of Silken Borders On Garments For Men, But It Should Not Be More Than Four Fingers Wide
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ اسْتِعْمَالِ إِنَاءِ الذَّهَبِ وَالْفِضَّةِ عَلَى الرِّجَالِ وَالنِّسَاءِ وَخَاتَمِ الذَّهَبِ وَالْحَرِيرِ عَلَى الرَّجُلِ وَإِبَاحَتِهِ لِلنِّسَاءِ وَإِبَاحَةِ الْعَلَمِ وَنَحْوِهِ لِلرَّجُلِ مَا لَمْ يَزِدْ عَلَى أَرْبَعِ أَصَابِعَ

chapters.title: The Permissibility Of Wearing Silk For Men, If A Man Has A Skin Disease Or Similar Problem
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِبَاحَةِ لُبْسِ الْحَرِيرِ لِلرَّجُلِ إِذَا كَانَ بِهِ حِكَّةٌ أَوْ نَحْوُهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: The Prohibition Of A Man Wearing A Garment Dyed With Safflower
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ لُبْسِ الرَّجُلِ الثَّوْبَ الْمُعَصْفَرَ، ‏‏

chapters.title: The Virtue Of Wearing The Hibarah
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ لِبَاسِ ثِيَابِ الْحِبَرَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Humility In Dress And Sticking To Coarse And Simple Clothes, Furnishings Etc., Permissibility Of Wearing Clothes Made From Camel Hair And Those On Which There Are Markings
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب التَّوَاضُعِ فِي اللِّبَاسِ وَالِاقْتِصَارِ عَلَى الْغَلِيظِ مِنْهُ وَالْيَسِيرِ فِي اللِّبَاسِ وَالْفِرَاشِ وَغَيْرِهِمَا

chapters.title: The Permissibility Of Using Blankets
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ اتِّخَاذِ الأَنْمَاطِ ‏‏

chapters.title: It Is Disliked To Have More Furniture And Bedding Than One Needs
chapters.title_arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ مَا زَادَ عَلَى الْحَاجَةِ مِنَ الْفِرَاشِ وَاللِّبَاسِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Prohibition Of Letting One's Garment Drag Out Of Pride, And The Extent To Which It Is Permissible To Let It Hang Down And The Extent To Which It Is Recommended
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ جَرِّ الثَّوْبِ خُيَلاَءَ وَبَيَانِ حَدِّ مَا يَجُوزُ إِرْخَاؤُهُ إِلَيْهِ وَمَا يُسْتَحَبّ

chapters.title: The Prohibition Against Strutting With Pride, And Being Amazed With One's Clothes
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ التَّبَخْتُرِ فِي الْمَشْىِ مَعَ إِعْجَابِهِ بِثِيَابِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Prohibition Of Gold Rings For Men, And Abrogation Of Their Allowance After The Beginning Of Islam
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب تَحْرِيمِ خَاتَمِ الذَّهَبِ عَلَى الرِّجَالِ وَنَسْخِ مَا كَانَ مِنْ إِبَاحَتِهِ فِي أَوَّلِ الْإِسْلَامِ

chapters.title: The Prophet (SAW) Wore A Ring Of Silver On Which Was Inscribed The Words Muhammad Rasul Allah (Muhammad the Messenger of Allah), And The Caliphs Wore It After He Died
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب لُبْسِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ خَاتَمًا مِنْ وَرِقٍ نَقْشُهُ مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ وَلُبْسِ الْخُلَفَاءِ لَهُ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ

chapters.title: The Prophet (SAW) Acquired A Ring When He Wanted To Send Letters To The Non-Arabs
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي اتِّخَاذِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم خَاتَمًا لَمَّا أَرَادَ أَنْ يَكْتُبَ إِلَى الْعَجَمِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Discarding Rings
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي طَرْحِ الْخَوَاتِمِ ‏.‏

chapters.title: Silver Ring With An Abyssinian Stone
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي خَاتَمِ الْوَرِقِ فَصُّهُ حَبَشِيٌّ ‏.‏

chapters.title: Wearing Rings On The Little Finger
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي لُبْسِ الْخَاتَمِ فِي الْخِنْصَرِ مِنَ الْيَدِ ‏.‏

chapters.title: The Prohibition Of Wearing Rings On The Middle Finger And The One That Is Next To It
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ التَّخَتُّمِ، فِي الْوُسْطَى وَالَّتِي تَلِيهَا ‏.‏

chapters.title: It Is Recommended To Wear Sandals et
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب اسْتِحْبَابِ لُبْسِ النِّعَالِ وَمَا فِي مَعْنَاهَا

chapters.title: It Is Recommended To Put Shoes On The Right Foot First, And To Take Them Off From The Left Foot First, And It Is Disliked To Walk In One Shoe
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب اسْتِحْبَابِ لُبْسِ النَّعْلِ فِي الْيُمْنَى أَوَّلًا وَالْخَلْعِ مِنْ الْيُسْرَى أَوَّلًا وَكَرَاهَةِ الْمَشْيِ فِي نَعْلٍ وَاحِدَةٍ

chapters.title: The Prohibition Of Ishtimal As-Samma' (Wrapping Oneself Up Entirely In One's Garment With No Room For The Arms To Emerge), And Al-Ihtiba' (Wrapping Oneself Up) In A Single Garment With The Legs Drawn Up To The Belly Exposing Part Of The 'Awrah
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ اشْتِمَالِ الصَّمَّاءِ، وَالاِحْتِبَاءِ، فِي ثَوْبٍ وَاحِدٍ ‏.‏

chapters.title: The Ruling On Lying On Ones Back With One Leg On Top Of The Other
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي مَنْعِ الاِسْتِلْقَاءِ عَلَى الظَّهْرِ وَوَضْعِ إِحْدَى الرِّجْلَيْنِ عَلَى الأُخْرَى ‏.‏

chapters.title: The Permissibility Of Lying Down And Placing One Leg On Top Of The Other
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي إِبَاحَةِ الاِسْتِلْقَاءِ وَوَضْعِ إِحْدَى الرِّجْلَيْنِ عَلَى الأُخْرَى ‏.‏

chapters.title: The Prohibition Of A Man Dyeing From With Saffron
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب نَهْيِ الرَّجُلِ عَنْ التَّزَعْفُرِ

chapters.title: It Is Recommended To Dye White Hair With Yellow Or Red Dye, But Black Dye Is Haram
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب اسْتِحْبَابِ خِضَابِ الشَّيْبِ بِصُفْرَةٍ أَوْ حُمْرَةٍ وَتَحْرِيمِهِ بِالسَّوَادِ

chapters.title: Differing From The Jews With Regard To Dyeing
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي مُخَالَفَةِ الْيَهُودِ فِي الصَّبْغِ ‏.‏

chapters.title: The Prohibition Of Making Images Of Living Beings, And The Prohibition Of Using Images That Are Not Subjected To Disrespect In Furnishings And The Like; The Angels (Peace Be Upon Them) Do Not Enter A House In Which There Is An Image Or A Dog
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب تَحْرِيمِ تَصْوِيرِ صُورَةِ الْحَيَوَانِ وَتَحْرِيمِ اتِّخَاذِ مَا فِيهِ صُورَةٌ غَيْرُ مُمْتَهَنَةٍ بِالْفَرْشِ وَنَحْوِهِ

chapters.title: It Is Disliked To Take Dogs And Bells On A Journey
chapters.title_arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ الْكَلْبِ وَالْجَرَسِ فِي السَّفَرِ ‏.‏

chapters.title: It Is Disliked To Hang Garlands On The Necks Of Camels
chapters.title_arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ قِلاَدَةِ الْوَتَرِ فِي رَقَبَةِ الْبَعِيرِ ‏.‏

chapters.title: The Prohibition Of Striking Or Branding Animals On The Face
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ ضَرْبِ الْحَيَوَانِ، فِي وَجْهِهِ وَوَسْمِهِ فِيهِ ‏.‏

chapters.title: The Permissibility Of Branding Animals Anywhere But On The Face, And This Is Recommended In The Case Of Animals Given As Zakat Ot Jizyah
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب جَوَازِ وَسْمِ الْحَيَوَانِ غَيْرِ الْآدَمِيِّ فِي غَيْرِ الْوَجْهِ وَنَدْبِهِ فِي نَعَمْ الزَّكَاةِ وَالْجِزْيَةِ

chapters.title: It Is Disliked To Shave Part Of The Head And Leave Part
chapters.title_arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ الْقَزَعِ ‏.‏

chapters.title: The Prohibition Of Sitting In The Street; And Giving The Street Its Rights
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ الْجُلُوسِ، فِي الطُّرُقَاتِ وَإِعْطَاءِ الطَّرِيقِ حَقَّهُ ‏.‏

chapters.title: The Prohibition Adding Hair Extensions, Having Them Added, Tattooing, Being Tattooed, An-Namisah, Al-Mutanamisah, Separating Teeth, And Changing The Creation Of Allah
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب تَحْرِيمِ فِعْلِ الْوَاصِلَةِ وَالْمُسْتَوْصِلَةِ وَالْوَاشِمَةِ وَالْمُسْتَوْشِمَةِ وَالنَّامِصَةِ وَالْمُتَنَمِّصَةِ وَالْمُتَفَلِّجَاتِ وَالْمُغَيِّرَاتِ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ

chapters.title: Women Who Are Clothed Yet Naked, Turning Away From Righteousness And Leading Others Astray
chapters.title_arabic: باب النِّسَاءِ الْكَاسِيَاتِ الْعَارِيَاتِ الْمَائِلاَتِ الْمُمِيلاَتِ ‏.‏

chapters.title: The Prohibition Of Wearing A Garment Of Falsehood Etc., And Pretending To Have That Which Has Not Been Given To One
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ التَّزْوِيرِ، فِي اللِّبَاسِ وَغَيْرِهِ وَالتَّشَبُّعِ بِمَا لَمْ يُعْطَ ‏.‏

chapters.title: The Prohibition Of Taking The Kunyah Abul-Qasim, And The Names Which Are Recommended
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ التَّكَنِّي، بِأَبِي الْقَاسِمِ وَبَيَانِ مَا يُسْتَحَبُّ مِنَ الأَسْمَاءِ ‏.‏

chapters.title: It Is Disliked To Use Objectionable Names And Names Such As Nafi' (Beneficial) Etc
chapters.title_arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ التَّسْمِيَةِ بِالأَسْمَاءِ الْقَبِيحَةِ وَبِنَافِعٍ وَنَحْوِهِ ‏.‏

chapters.title: It Is Recommended To Change Bad Names To Good Names, And To Change The Name Barrah To Zainab, Juwayriyah And The Like
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب اسْتِحْبَابِ تَغْيِيرِ الِاسْمِ الْقَبِيحِ إِلَى حَسَنٍ وَتَغْيِيرِ اسْمِ بَرَّةَ إِلَى زَيْنَبَ وَجُوَيْرِيَةَ وَنَحْوِهِمَا

chapters.title: The Prohibition Of The Names Malik Al-Amlak Or Malik Al-Muluk "King Of Kings"
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ التَّسَمِّي بِمَلِكِ الأَمْلاَكِ وَبِمَلِكِ الْمُلُوكِ ‏‏

chapters.title: It Is Recommended To Perform Tahnik For The Newborn When He Is Born And To Take Him To A Righteous Man To Perform Tahnik For Him; It Is Permissible To Name Him On The Day He Is Born, And It Is Recommended To Use The Names 'Abdullah, Ibrahim, And The Names Of All Other Prophets, Peace Be Upon Them
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب اسْتِحْبَابِ تَحْنِيكِ الْمَوْلُودِ عِنْدَ وِلَادَتِهِ وَحَمْلِهِ إِلَى صَالِحٍ يُحَنِّكُهُ وَجَوَازِ تَسْمِيَتِهِ يَوْمَ وِلَادَتِهِ وَاسْتِحْبَابِ التَّسْمِيَةِ بِعَبْدِ اللَّهِ وَإِبْرَاهِيمَ وَسَائِرِ أَسْمَاءِ الْأَنْبِيَاءِ عَلَيْهِمْ السَّلَام

chapters.title: It Is Permissible To Say: "O My Son" To Someone Other Than One's Son, And It Is Recommended To Speak Kindly
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ قَوْلِهِ لِغَيْرِ ابْنِهِ يَا بُنَىَّ وَاسْتِحْبَابِهِ لِلْمُلاَطَفَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Seeking Permission To Enter A House
chapters.title_arabic: باب الاِسْتِئْذَانِ ‏‏

chapters.title: It Is Disliked For The Person Who Is Seeking Permission To Say "Me" When Asked "Who Is It?"
chapters.title_arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ قَوْلِ الْمُسْتَأْذِنِ أَنَا ‏إِذَا قِيلَ مَنْ هَذَا ‏‏

chapters.title: The Prohibition Of Looking Into A House
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ النَّظَرِ فِي بَيْتِ غَيْرِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: An Accidental Glance
chapters.title_arabic: باب نَظَرِ الْفَجْأَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The One Who Is Riding Should Greet The One Who Is Walking, And The Smaller Group Should Greet The Larger Group
chapters.title_arabic: باب يُسَلِّمُ الرَّاكِبُ عَلَى الْمَاشِي وَالْقَلِيلُ عَلَى الْكَثِيرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: One Of The Duties Of Sitting In The Street Is To Return Salam
chapters.title_arabic: باب مِنْ حَقِّ الْجُلُوسِ عَلَى الطَّرِيقِ رَدُّ السَّلاَمِ ‏‏

chapters.title: One Of The Rights Of One Muslim Over Another Is (The Greeting Of) Salam
chapters.title_arabic: باب مِنْ حَقِّ الْمُسْلِمِ لِلْمُسْلِمِ رَدُّ السَّلاَمِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Prohibition Of Initiating The Greeting With The People Of The Book, And How To Respond To Them
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ ابْتِدَاءِ، أَهْلِ الْكِتَابِ بِالسَّلاَمِ وَكَيْفَ يَرُدُّ عَلَيْهِمْ ‏‏

chapters.title: It Is Recommended To Greet Children With Salam
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ السَّلاَمِ عَلَى الصِّبْيَانِ ‏‏

chapters.title: It Is Permissible To Give Permission To Enter By Raising The Curtain Or Giving Some Other Sign
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ جَعْلِ الإِذْنِ رَفْعَ حِجَابٍ أَوْ نَحْوَهُ مِنَ الْعَلاَمَاتِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Permissibility Of Women Going Out To Relieve Themselves
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِبَاحَةُ الْخُرُوجِ لِلنِّسَاءِ لِقَضَاءِ حَاجَةِ الإِنْسَانِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Prohibition Of Being Alone With A Non-Mahram Woman Or Entering Upon Her
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الْخَلْوَةِ بِالأَجْنَبِيَّةِ وَالدُّخُولِ عَلَيْهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: It Is Recommended For The One Who Is Seen Alone With A Woman Who Is His Wife Or Mahram, To Say; "This Is So-And-So,' To Ward off Suspicion
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّهُ يُسْتَحَبُّ لِمَنْ رُئِيَ خَالِيًا بِامْرَأَةٍ وَكَانَتْ زَوْجَةً أَوْ مَحْرَمًا لَهُ

chapters.title: If A Man Comes To A Gathering And Finds A Space. Let Him Sit There, Otherwise Let Him Sit Behind Them
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَنْ أَتَى مَجْلِسًا فَوَجَدَ فُرْجَةً فَجَلَسَ فِيهَا وَإِلاَّ وَرَاءَهُمْ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Prohibition Of Making A Man Get Up From A Place That He Reached First
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ إِقَامَةِ الإِنْسَانِ مِنْ مَوْضِعِهِ الْمُبَاحِ الَّذِي سَبَقَ إِلَيْهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: If A Man Gets Up From His Spot Then Comes Back To It, He Has More Right To It
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِذَا قَامَ مِنْ مَجْلِسِهِ ثُمَّ عَادَ فَهُوَ أَحَقُّ بِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Forbidding A Hermaphrodite From Entering Upon Non-Mahram Women
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَنْعِ الْمُخَنَّثِ مِنَ الدُّخُولِ عَلَى النِّسَاءِ الأَجَانِبِ ‏‏

chapters.title: It Is Permissible To Seat A Non-Mahram Woman Behind One (On A Mount) If She Is Exhausted On The Road
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ إِرْدَافِ الْمَرْأَةِ الأَجْنَبِيَّةِ إِذَا أَعْيَتْ فِي الطَّرِيقِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Prohibition Of Two People Conversing Privately To The Exclusion Of A Third Without His Consent
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ مُنَاجَاةِ الاِثْنَيْنِ دُونَ الثَّالِثِ بِغَيْرِ رِضَاهُ ‏‏

chapters.title: Medicine, Sickness And Ruqyah
chapters.title_arabic: باب الطِّبِّ وَالْمَرَضِ وَالرُّقَى ‏‏

chapters.title: Witchcraft
chapters.title_arabic: باب السِّحْرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Poison
chapters.title_arabic: باب السَّمِّ ‏‏

chapters.title: It Is Recommended To Recite Ruqyah For One Who Is Sick
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ رُقْيَةِ الْمَرِيضِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Reciting Al-Mu'awwidhat As Ruqyah For The Sick, And Blowing Over Them
chapters.title_arabic: باب رُقْيَةِ الْمَرِيضِ بِالْمُعَوِّذَاتِ وَالنَّفْثِ ‏‏

chapters.title: It Is Recommended To Recite Ruqyah For The Evil Eye, Pustules, And Stings
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الرُّقْيَةِ مِنَ الْعَيْنِ وَالنَّمْلَةِ وَالْحُمَةِ وَالنَّظْرَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: There Is Nothing Wrong With Ruqyah That Does Not Involve Shirk
chapters.title_arabic: باب لاَ بَأْسَ بِالرُّقَى مَا لَمْ يَكُنْ فِيهِ شِرْكٌ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Permissibility Of Accepting A Reward For Reciting Ruqyah With Qur'an And Supplications
chapters.title_arabic: باب جَوَازِ أَخْذِ الأُجْرَةِ عَلَى الرُّقْيَةِ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَالأَذْكَارِ ‏‏

chapters.title: It Is Recommended To Put Ones Hand On The Site Of The Pain When Supplicating
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ وَضْعِ يَدِهِ عَلَى مَوْضِعِ الأَلَمِ مَعَ الدُّعَاءِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Seeking Refuge With Allah From The Devil Who Whispers During Prayer
chapters.title_arabic: باب التَّعَوُّذِ مِنْ شَيْطَانِ الْوَسْوَسَةِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: For Every Disease There Is A Remedy, And It Is Recommended To Treat Disease
chapters.title_arabic: باب لِكُلِّ دَاءٍ دَوَاءٌ وَاسْتِحْبَابُ التَّدَاوِي ‏‏

chapters.title: It Is Disliked To Administer Medicine In The Side Of The Mouth Forcibly
chapters.title_arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ التَّدَاوِي بِاللَّدُودِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Treatment With Indian Aloeswood, Which Is Costmary
chapters.title_arabic: باب التَّدَاوِي بِالْعُودِ الْهِنْدِيِّ وَهُوَ الْكُسْتُ ‏‏

chapters.title: Healing Sickness With The Black Seed
chapters.title_arabic: باب التَّدَاوِي بِالْحَبَّةِ السَّوْدَاءِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Talbinah Gives Comfort To The Sick Person
chapters.title_arabic: باب التَّلْبِينَةُ مَجَمَّةٌ لِفُؤَادِ الْمَرِيضِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Treating Sickness With A Drink Of Honey
chapters.title_arabic: باب التَّدَاوِي بِسَقْىِ الْعَسَلِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Plague, Ill Omens, Soothsaying And The Like
chapters.title_arabic: باب الطَّاعُونِ وَالطِّيَرَةِ وَالْكَهَانَةِ وَنَحْوِهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: There Is No 'Adwa, No Tiyarah (Evil Omens), No Hamah. No Safar, No Nawa', And No Ghoul, And No Sick Camel Should Be Brought To A Healthy Camel
chapters.title_arabic: باب لاَ عَدْوَى وَلاَ طِيَرَةَ وَلاَ هَامَةَ وَلاَ صَفَرَ

chapters.title: (Evil) Omens And Al-Fa'l, And That Which May Be Regarded As Inauspicious
chapters.title_arabic: باب الطِّيَرَةِ وَالْفَأْلِ وَمَا يَكُونُ فِيهِ الشُّؤْمُ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Prohibition Of Soothsaying And Going To Soothsayers
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ الْكِهَانَةِ وَإِتْيَانِ الْكُهَّانِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Avoiding Lepers Etc.
chapters.title_arabic: باب اجْتِنَابِ الْمَجْذُومِ وَنَحْوِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Killing Snakes Etc.
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَتْلِ الْحَيَّاتِ وَغَيْرِهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: It Is Recommended To Kill Geckos
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ قَتْلِ الْوَزَغِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Prohibition Of Killing Ants
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ قَتْلِ النَّمْلِ، ‏‏

chapters.title: The Prohibition Of Killing Cats
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ قَتْلِ الْهِرَّةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Virtue Of Giving Food And Water To Animals Which Are Unlawful To Eat
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ سَاقِي الْبَهَائِمِ الْمُحْتَرَمَةِ وَإِطْعَامِهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: The Prohibition Of Cursing Time

chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الشَّفَاعَةِ فِيمَا لَيْسَ بِحَرَامٍ ‏ ‏

chapters.title: It Is Recommend To Keep Company With Righteous People And Avoid Bad Company
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ مُجَالَسَةِ الصَّالِحِينَ وَمُجَانَبَةِ قُرَنَاءِ السَّوْءِ ‏ ‏

chapters.title: The Virtue Of Treating Daughters Well
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ الإِحْسَانِ إِلَى الْبَنَاتِ ‏ ‏

chapters.title: The Virtue Of One Whose Child Dies And He Seeks Reward
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ مَنْ يَمُوتُ لَهُ وَلَدٌ فَيَحْتَسِبُهُ ‏ ‏

chapters.title: When Allah Loves A Person. He Commands Jibril To Love Him, And He Loves Him, And The People Of Heaven Love Him, Then He Finds Acceptance On Earth
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِذَا أَحَبَّ اللَّهُ عَبْدًا حَبَّبَهُ إِلَى عِبَادِهِ ‏ ‏

chapters.title: Souls Are Like Conscripted Soldiers
chapters.title_arabic: باب الأَرْوَاحِ جُنُودٌ مُجَنَّدَةٌ ‏ ‏

chapters.title: A Man Will Be With Those Whom He Loves
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْمَرْءُ مَعَ مَنْ أَحَبَّ ‏ ‏

chapters.title: If A Righteous Man Is Praised, It Is Glad Tidings For Him And Will Not Harm Him
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِذَا أُثْنِيَ عَلَى الصَّالِحِ فَهِيَ بُشْرَى وَلاَ تَضُرُّهُ ‏ ‏

chapters.title: How The Human Being Is Created, In His Mother's Womb, And His Provision, Lifespan And Deeds Are Written Down, And His Misery and Happiness
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب كَيْفِيَّةِ خَلْقِ الْآدَمِيِّ فِي بَطْنِ أُمِّهِ وَكِتَابَةِ رِزْقِهِ وَأَجَلِهِ وَعَمَلِهِ وَشَقَاوَتِهِ وَسَعَادَتِهِ

chapters.title: The Debate Between Adam And Musa (Peace And Blessings Of Allah Be Upon Them)
chapters.title_arabic: باب حِجَاجِ آدَمَ وَمُوسَى عَلَيْهِمَا السَّلاَمُ ‏ ‏

chapters.title: Allah Directs Hearts As He Wills
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَصْرِيفِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى الْقُلُوبَ كَيْفَ شَاءَ ‏ ‏

chapters.title: Everything Is Decided And Decreed
chapters.title_arabic: باب كُلُّ شَىْءٍ بِقَدَرٍ ‏ ‏

chapters.title: The Son Of Adam's Share Of Zina Etc. Is Decreed For Him
chapters.title_arabic: باب قُدِّرَ عَلَى ابْنِ آدَمَ حَظُّهُ مِنَ الزِّنَى وَغَيْرِهِ ‏ ‏

chapters.title: The Meaning Of "Every Child Is Born In A State Of Fitrah" And The Ruling On The Dead Children Of The Disbelievers And Of The Muslims.
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب مَعْنَى كُلِّ مَوْلُودٍ يُولَدُ عَلَى الْفِطْرَةِ وَحُكْمِ مَوْتِ أَطْفَالِ الْكُفَّارِ وَأَطْفَالِ الْمُسْلِمِينَ

chapters.title: Lifespans, Provisions, Etc. Do Not Increase Or Decrease From What Has Already Been Decreed
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب بَيَانِ أَنَّ الْآجَالَ وَالْأَرْزَاقَ وَغَيْرَهَا لَا تَزِيدُ وَلَا تَنْقُصُ عَمَّا سَبَقَ بِهِ الْقَدَرُ

chapters.title: Belief In The Divine Decree And Submission To It
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب فِي الْأَمْرِ بِالْقُوَّةِ وَتَرْكِ الْعَجْزِ وَالِاسْتِعَانَةِ بِاللَّهِ وَتَفْوِيضِ الْمَقَادِيرِ لِلَّهِ

chapters.title: The Prohibition Of, And Warning Against Seeking Out Verses Of The Quran Whose Meanings Are Not Decisive; The Prohibition Of Arguing About The Qur'an
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب النَّهْيِ عَنْ اتِّبَاعِ مُتَشَابِهِ الْقُرْآنِ وَالتَّحْذِيرِ مِنْ مُتَّبِعِيهِ وَالنَّهْيِ عَنْ الِاخْتِلَافِ فِي الْقُرْآنِ

chapters.title: The One Who Is Harsh In Arguing
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي الأَلَدِّ الْخَصِمِ

chapters.title: Following The Ways Of The Jews And Christians
chapters.title_arabic: باب اتِّبَاعِ سُنَنِ الْيَهُودِ وَالنَّصَارَى

chapters.title: The Destruction Of Those Who Go To Extremes
chapters.title_arabic: باب هَلَكَ الْمُتَنَطِّعُونَ

chapters.title: The Taking Away Of Knowledge And The Spread Of Ignorance At The End Of Time
chapters.title_arabic: باب رَفْعِ الْعِلْمِ وَقَبْضِهِ وَظُهُورِ الْجَهْلِ وَالْفِتَنِ فِي آخِرِ الزَّمَانِ

chapters.title: The One Who Starts Something Good Or Something Bad; The One Who Calls Others To Guidance Or Misguidance
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَنْ سَنَّ سُنَّةً حَسَنَةً أَوْ سَيِّئَةً وَمَنْ دَعَا إِلَى هُدًى أَوْ ضَلاَلَةٍ

chapters.title: Encouragement To Remember Allah, Exalted is He
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْحَثِّ عَلَى ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى

chapters.title: The Names Of Allah, Exalted is He, And The Virtue Of The One Who Learns Them By Heart
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي أَسْمَاءِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى وَفَضْلِ مَنْ أَحْصَاهَا

chapters.title: Being Firm In Supplication And Not Saying: "If You Will"
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْعَزْمِ بِالدُّعَاءِ وَلاَ يَقُلْ إِنْ شِئْتَ

chapters.title: It Is Disliked To Wish For Death Because Of Some Harm That Has Befallen One
chapters.title_arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ تَمَنِّي الْمَوْتِ لِضُرٍّ نَزَلَ بِهِ

chapters.title: Whoever Loves To Meet Allah, Allah Loves To Meet Him, And Whoever Hates To Meet Allah, Allah Hates To Meet Him
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب مَنْ أَحَبَّ لِقَاءَ اللَّهِ أَحَبَّ اللَّهُ لِقَاءَهُ وَمَنْ كَرِهَ لِقَاءَ اللَّهِ كَرِهَ اللَّهُ لِقَاءَهُ

chapters.title: The Virtue Of Remembrance, Supplication, Drawing Close To Allah And Thinking Positively Of Him
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ الذِّكْرِ وَالدُّعَاءِ وَالتَّقَرُّبِ إِلَى اللَّهِ تَعَالَى

chapters.title: It Is Disliked To Pray For Punishment To Be Brought Forward In This World
chapters.title_arabic: باب كَرَاهَةِ الدُّعَاءِ بِتَعْجِيلِ الْعُقُوبَةِ فِي الدُّنْيَا

chapters.title: The Virtues Of Gathering To Remember Allah (Adh-Dhikr)
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ مَجَالِسِ الذِّكْرِ

chapters.title: The Virtue Of The Supplication: "O Allah, Give Us Good In This World And Good In The Hereafter, And Save Us From The Torment Of The Fire"
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب فَضْلِ الدُّعَاءِ بِاللَّهُمَّ آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ

chapters.title: The Virtue Of Tahlil (Saying La Ilaha Ill-Allah), Tasbih (Saying Subhan Allah) And (Du'a) Supplication
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ التَّهْلِيلِ وَالتَّسْبِيحِ وَالدُّعَاءِ

chapters.title: The Virtue Of Gathering To Read Quran And To Remember Allah
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ الاِجْتِمَاعِ عَلَى تِلاَوَةِ الْقُرْآنِ وَعَلَى الذِّكْرِ

chapters.title: It Is Recommend To Pray For Forgiveness A Great Deal
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الاِسْتِغْفَارِ وَالاِسْتِكْثَارِ مِنْهُ

chapters.title: It Is Recommend To Lower One's Voice When Saying Remembrance, Except In The Cases Where It Is Commanded To Raise The Voice Such As The Talbiyah Etc. It Is Recommend To Say A Great Deal, "There Is No Power And No Strength Except With Allah"
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ خَفْضِ الصَّوْتِ بِالذِّكْرِ

chapters.title: Supplications And Seeking Refuge With Allah
chapters.title_arabic: باب التَّعَوُّذِ مِنْ شَرِّ الْفِتَنِ وَغَيْرِهَا

chapters.title: Seeking Refuge With Allah From Helplessness, Laziness Etc
chapters.title_arabic: باب التَّعَوُّذِ مِنَ الْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ وَغَيْرِهِ

chapters.title: Seeking Refuge From A Bad End, And Misery Etc
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي التَّعَوُّذِ مِنْ سُوءِ الْقَضَاءِ وَدَرَكِ الشَّقَاءِ وَغَيْرِهِ

chapters.title: Supplication When Going To Sleep
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا يَقُولُ عِنْدَ النَّوْمِ وَأَخْذِ الْمَضْجَعِ

chapters.title: Supplications [Of The Prophet (SAW)]
chapters.title_arabic: باب التَّعَوُّذِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا عَمِلَ وَمِنْ شَرِّ مَا لَمْ يَعْمَلْ

chapters.title: The Tasbih At The Beginning Of The Day And When Going To Sleep
chapters.title_arabic: باب التَّسْبِيحِ أَوَّلَ النَّهَارِ وَعِنْدَ النَّوْمِ

chapters.title: It Is Recommend To Say Supplication When A Rooster Crows
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ الدُّعَاءِ عِنْدَ صِيَاحِ الدِّيكِ

chapters.title: Supplication At Times Of Distress
chapters.title_arabic: باب دُعَاءِ الْكَرْبِ

chapters.title: The Virtue Of (Saying): "Glory To Allah And With His Praise"
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Virtue Of Praying For The Muslims In Their Absence
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ الدُّعَاءِ لِلْمُسْلِمِينَ بِظَهْرِ الْغَيْبِ ‏‏

chapters.title: It Is Recommend To Praise Allah After Eating And Drinking
chapters.title_arabic: باب اسْتِحْبَابِ حَمْدِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى بَعْدَ الأَكْلِ وَالشُّرْبِ ‏‏

chapters.title: It Is Recommended For The One Who Supplicated Not To Be Impatient. And Not To Say: "I Supplicated And Received No Response"
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَيَانِ أَنَّهُ يُسْتَجَابُ لِلدَّاعِي مَا لَمْ يَعْجَلْ فَيَقُولُ دَعَوْتُ فَلَمْ يُسْتَجَبْ لِي ‏‏

chapters.title: "Most Of The People Of Paradise Are Poor, And Most Of The Inhabitants Of The Fire Are Women, And The Fitnah Of Women"
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب أَكْثَرُ أَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ الْفُقَرَاءُ وَأَكْثَرُ أَهْلِ النَّارِ النِّسَاءُ وَبَيَانِ الْفِتْنَةِ بِالنِّسَاءِ

chapters.title: The Story Of Three Men In The Cave And Their Tawossul (Seeking To Draw Close To Allah) By Means Of Righteous Deeds
chapters.title_arabic: باب قِصَّةِ أَصْحَابِ الْغَارِ الثَّلاَثَةِ وَالتَّوَسُّلِ بِصَالِحِ الأَعْمَالِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Exhortation To Repent And Rejoicing Therein
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي الْحَضِّ عَلَى التَّوْبَةِ وَالْفَرَحِ بِهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: Sins Are Erased By Praying For Forgiveness And Repenting
chapters.title_arabic: باب سُقُوطِ الذُّنُوبِ بِالاِسْتِغْفَارِ تَوْبَةً ‏‏

chapters.title: The Virtue Of Constant Dhikr, Thinking Of The Hereafter, And Remembering That Allah Is Always Watching; Permissibility Of Stopping That Sometimes, And Attending To Worldly Matters
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب فَضْلِ دَوَامِ الذِّكْرِ وَالْفِكْرِ فِي أُمُورِ الْآخِرَةِ وَالْمُرَاقَبَةِ وَجَوَازِ تَرْكِ ذَلِكَ فِي بَعْضِ الْأَوْقَاتِ وَالِاشْتِغَالِ بِالدُّنْيَا

chapters.title: The Vastaess Of Allah's Mercy, Which Prevails Over His Wrath
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي سَعَةِ رَحْمَةِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى وَأَنَّهَا سَبَقَتْ غَضَبَهُ ‏‏

chapters.title: Acceptance Of Repentance From Sin, Even If The Sin And Repentance Happen Repeatedly
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَبُولِ التَّوْبَةِ مِنَ الذُّنُوبِ وَإِنْ تَكَرَّرَتِ الذُّنُوبُ وَالتَّوْبَةُ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Protective Jealousy (Ghirah) Of Allah The Most High, And The Prohibition Of Immoral Behavior
chapters.title_arabic: باب غَيْرَةِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى وَتَحْرِيمِ الْفَوَاحِشِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Words Of Allah The Most High: "Verily, The Good Deeds Remove The Evil Deeds"
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى ‏<qref chapter="11" verses="114">{‏ إِنَّ الْحَسَنَاتِ يُذْهِبْنَ السَّيِّئَاتِ}</qref>

chapters.title: The Acceptance Of The Repentance Of The One Who Kills, Even If He Has Killed A Great Deal
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَبُولِ تَوْبَةِ الْقَاتِلِ وَإِنْ كَثُرَ قَتْلُهُ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Repentance Of Ka'b Ibn Malik And His Two Companions
chapters.title_arabic: باب حَدِيثِ تَوْبَةِ كَعْبِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ وَصَاحِبَيْهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Al-Ifk (The Slander) And The Acceptance Of The Slanderer's Repentance
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي حَدِيثِ الإِفْكِ وَقَبُولِ تَوْبَةِ الْقَاذِفِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Exoneration Of The Prophet's Concubine
chapters.title_arabic: باب بَرَاءَةِ حَرَمِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم مِنَ الرِّيبَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Beginning Of Creation And The Creation Of Adam, (Peace Be Upon Him)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ابْتِدَاءِ الْخَلْقِ وَخَلْقِ آدَمَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلاَمُ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Resurrection And Description Of The Earth On The Day Of Resurrection
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي الْبَعْثِ وَالنُّشُورِ وَصِفَةِ الأَرْضِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Welcoming Feast Of The People Of Paradise
chapters.title_arabic: باب نُزُلِ أَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Jews' Asking The Prophet (SAW) About The Soul, And The Words Of Allah: "And They Ask You Concerning The Ruh (The Spirit)"
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب سُؤَالِ الْيَهُودِ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ عَنْ الرُّوحِ وَقَوْله تَعَالَى يَسْأَلُونَكَ عَنْ الرُّوحِ الْآيَةَ

chapters.title: The Words Of Allah The Most High: "And Allah Would Not Punish Them While You Are Amongst Them"
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي قَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى ‏<qref chapter="8" verses="33">{‏ وَمَا كَانَ اللَّهُ لِيُعَذِّبَهُمْ وَأَنْتَ فِيهِمْ}</qref>

chapters.title: The Words Of Allah: "Verily, Man Does Transgress Because He Considers Himself Self-Sufficient."
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="96" verses="6-7">{‏ إِنَّ الإِنْسَانَ لَيَطْغَى * أَنْ رَآهُ اسْتَغْنَى‏}</qref>

chapters.title: The Smoke (Ad-Dukhan)
chapters.title_arabic: باب الدُّخَانِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Splitting Of The Moon
chapters.title_arabic: باب انْشِقَاقِ الْقَمَرِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Disbelievers
chapters.title_arabic: باب لاَ أَحَدَ أَصْبَرُ عَلَى أَذًى مِنَ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Disbeliever Seeking Ransom With An Earthful Of Gold
chapters.title_arabic: باب طَلَبِ الْكَافِرِ الْفِدَاءَ بِمِلْءِ الأَرْضِ ذَهَبًا ‏‏

chapters.title: The Disbeliever Will Be Driven Upon His Face
chapters.title_arabic: باب يُحْشَرُ الْكَافِرُ عَلَى وَجْهِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Most Affluent Of People In This World Will Be Dipped In The Fire, And The Most Destitute Will Be Dipped In Paradise
chapters.title_arabic: باب صَبْغِ أَنْعَمِ أَهْلِ الدُّنْيَا فِي النَّارِ وَصَبْغِ أَشَدِّهِمْ بُؤْسًا فِي الْجَنَّةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Believer Is Rewarded For His Good Deeds In This World, And In The Hereafter, And The Disbeliever Is Rewarded For His Good Deeds In This World
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب جَزَاءِ الْمُؤْمِنِ بِحَسَنَاتِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ وَتَعْجِيلِ حَسَنَاتِ الْكَافِرِ فِي الدُّنْيَا

chapters.title: The Believer Is Like A Plant And The Hypocrite And The Disbeliever Are Like Cedars
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَثَلُ الْمُؤْمِنِ كَالزَّرْعِ وَمَثَلُ الْكَافِرِ كَشَجَرِ الأَرْزِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Likeness Of The Believer Is That Of A Date Palm
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَثَلُ الْمُؤْمِنِ مَثَلُ النَّخْلَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Mischief Of The Shaitan And How He Sends His Troops To Tempt People, And With Every Person There Is A Qarin (Companion From Among The Jinn)
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب تَحْرِيشِ الشَّيْطَانِ وَبَعْثِهِ سَرَايَاهُ لِفِتْنَةِ النَّاسِ وَأَنَّ مَعَ كُلِّ إِنْسَانٍ قَرِينًا

chapters.title: No One Will Enter Paradise By Virtue Of His Deeds, Rather By The Mercy Of Allah, Exalted Is He
chapters.title_arabic: باب لَنْ يَدْخُلَ أَحَدٌ الْجَنَّةَ بِعَمَلِهِ بَلْ بِرَحْمَةِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏‏

chapters.title: Doing A Lot Of Good Deeds And Striving Hard In Worship
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِكْثَارِ الأَعْمَالِ وَالاِجْتِهَادِ فِي الْعِبَادَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: Moderation In Preaching
chapters.title_arabic: باب الاِقْتِصَادِ فِي الْمَوْعِظَةِ ‏‏

chapters.title: In Paradise There Is A Tree In Whose Shade A Rider Could Travel For One Hundred Years And Still Not Cross It
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِنَّ فِي الْجَنَّةِ شَجَرَةً يَسِيرُ الرَّاكِبُ فِي ظِلِّهَا مِائَةَ عَامٍ لاَ يَقْطَعُهَا ‏‏

chapters.title: Bestowal Of Divine Pleasure On The People Of Paradise, And Allah Will Never Be Angry With Them
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِحْلاَلِ الرِّضْوَانِ عَلَى أَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ فَلاَ يَسْخَطُ عَلَيْهِمْ أَبَدًا ‏‏

chapters.title: The Inhabitants Of Paradise Will See The People In The Highest Place In Paradise As Planets Are Seen In The Sky
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَرَائِي أَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ أَهْلَ الْغُرَفِ كَمَا يُرَى الْكَوْكَبُ فِي السَّمَاءِ ‏‏

chapters.title: One Who Would Love To Have Seen The Prophet (SAW) Even If That Was At The Expense Of His Family And His Wealth
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِيمَنْ يَوَدُّ رُؤْيَةَ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم بِأَهْلِهِ وَمَالِهِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The Market Of Paradise, And What They Will Get There Of Delight And Beauty
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي سُوقِ الْجَنَّةِ وَمَا يَنَالُونَ فِيهَا مِنَ النَّعِيمِ وَالْجَمَالِ ‏‏

chapters.title: The First Group To Enter Paradise Will Look Like The Moon When It Is Full; Their Attributes And Their Spouses
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب أَوَّلُ زُمْرَةٍ تَدْخُلُ الْجَنَّةَ عَلَى صُورَةِ الْقَمَرِ لَيْلَةَ الْبَدْرِ وَصِفَاتُهُمْ وَأَزْوَاجُهُمْ

chapters.title: The Attributes Of Paradise And Its People, And Their Glorifying Allah Every Morning And Evening
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي صِفَاتِ الْجَنَّةِ وَأَهْلِهَا وَتَسْبِيحِهِمْ فِيهَا بُكْرَةً وَعَشِيًّا ‏‏

chapters.title: The Eternal Delight Of The People Of Paradise, And The Verse In Which Allah Says: "And It Will Be Announced To Them: This Is The Paradise Which You Have Inherited For What You Used To Do"
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب فِي دَوَامِ نَعِيمِ أَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ وَقَوْله تَعَالَى وَنُودُوا أَنْ تِلْكُمْ الْجَنَّةُ أُورِثْتُمُوهَا بِمَا كُنْتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ

chapters.title: The Tents Of Paradise, And The Wives That The Believers Will Have In Them
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي صِفَةِ خِيَامِ الْجَنَّةِ وَمَا لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ فِيهَا مِنَ الأَهْلِينَ

chapters.title: Rivers Of Paradise In This World
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا فِي الدُّنْيَا مِنْ أَنْهَارِ الْجَنَّةِ

chapters.title: People Will Enter Paradise Whose Hearts Are Like The Hearts Of Birds
chapters.title_arabic: باب يَدْخُلُ الْجَنَّةَ أَقْوَامٌ أَفْئِدَتُهُمْ مِثْلُ أَفْئِدَةِ الطَّيْرِ

chapters.title: About Hell - May Allah Protect Us From It
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي شِدَّةِ حَرِّ نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ وَبُعْدِ قَعْرِهَا وَمَا تَأْخُذُ مِنَ الْمُعَذَّبِينَ

chapters.title: The Arrogant Will Enter The Fire, And The Humble Will Enter Paradise
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّارُ يَدْخُلُهَا الْجَبَّارُونَ وَالْجَنَّةُ يَدْخُلُهَا الضُّعَفَاءُ

chapters.title: The Passing Away Of This World, And The Gathering On The Day Of Resurrection
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَنَاءِ الدُّنْيَا وَبَيَانِ الْحَشْرِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ

chapters.title: The Description Of The Day Of Resurrection - May Allah Save Us From Its Terrors
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي صِفَةِ يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ أَعَانَنَا اللَّهُ عَلَى أَهْوَالِهَا

chapters.title: Attributes By Which The People Of Paradise And The People Of The Fire May Be Recognized In This World
chapters.title_arabic: باب الصِّفَاتِ الَّتِي يُعْرَفُ بِهَا فِي الدُّنْيَا أَهْلُ الْجَنَّةِ وَأَهْلُ النَّارِ

chapters.title: The Deceased Is Shown His Place In Paradise Or The Fire; And Confirmation Of The Torment In The Grave - We Seek Refuge With Allah From That
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب عَرْضِ مَقْعَدِ الْمَيِّتِ مِنْ الْجَنَّةِ أَوْ النَّارِ عَلَيْهِ وَإِثْبَاتِ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ وَالتَّعَوُّذِ مِنْهُ

chapters.title: The Surety Of Reckoning
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِثْبَاتِ الْحِسَابِ

chapters.title: The Command To Think Positively Of Allah At The Time Of Death
chapters.title_arabic: باب الأَمْرِ بِحُسْنِ الظَّنِّ بِاللَّهِ تَعَالَى عِنْدَ الْمَوْتِ

chapters.title: The Approach Of Tribulations And The Opening Of The Barrier Of Ya'juj And Ma'juj
chapters.title_arabic: باب اقْتِرَابِ الْفِتَنِ وَفَتْحِ رَدْمِ يَأْجُوجَ وَمَأْجُوجَ

chapters.title: The Earth Swallowing Up The Army That Aims To Attack The Ka'bah
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْخَسْفِ بِالْجَيْشِ الَّذِي يَؤُمُّ الْبَيْتَ

chapters.title: Onset Of Tribulations Like Rainfall
chapters.title_arabic: باب نُزُولِ الْفِتَنِ كَمَوَاقِعِ الْقَطْرِ

chapters.title: If Two Muslims Confront One Another With Their Swords
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِذَا تَوَاجَهَ الْمُسْلِمَانِ بِسَيْفَيْهِمَا

chapters.title: (Parts of) This Ummah Will Destroy One Another
chapters.title_arabic: باب هَلاَكُ هَذِهِ الأُمَّةِ بَعْضِهِمْ بِبَعْضٍ

chapters.title: The Prophet's Foretelling Of What Will Happen Until The Hour Begins
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِخْبَارِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فِيمَا يَكُونُ إِلَى قِيَامِ السَّاعَةِ

chapters.title: The Tribulation That Will Come like Waves Of The Ocean
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي الْفِتْنَةِ الَّتِي تَمُوجُ كَمَوْجِ الْبَحْرِ

chapters.title: The Hour Will Not Begin Until The Euphrates Uncovers A Mountain Of Gold
chapters.title_arabic: باب لاَ تَقُومُ السَّاعَةُ حَتَّى يَحْسِرَ الْفُرَاتُ عَنْ جَبَلٍ مِنْ ذَهَبٍ

chapters.title: The Conquest Of Constantinople, The Emergence Of The Dajjal And The Descent Of 'Eisa bin Mariam
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي فَتْحِ قُسْطُنْطِينِيَّةَ وَخُرُوجِ الدَّجَّالِ وَنُزُولِ عِيسَى ابْنِ مَرْيَمَ

chapters.title: The Hour Will Begin When The Byzantines Are The Most Prevalent Of People
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَقُومُ السَّاعَةُ وَالرُّومُ أَكْثَرُ النَّاسِ

chapters.title: Fighting The Byzantines, And A Great Deal Of Killing When Ad-Dajjal Emerges
chapters.title_arabic: باب إِقْبَالِ الرُّومِ فِي كَثْرَةِ الْقَتْلِ عِنْدَ خُرُوجِ الدَّجَّالِ

chapters.title: Conquests Of The Muslims Before The Appearance Of Ad-Dajjal
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا يَكُونُ مِنْ فُتُوحَاتِ الْمُسْلِمِينَ قَبْلَ الدَّجَّالِ

chapters.title: The Signs Which Will Appear Before The Hour
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي الآيَاتِ الَّتِي تَكُونُ قَبْلَ السَّاعَةِ

chapters.title: The Hour Will Not Begin Until A Fire Emerges From The Land Of The Hijaz
chapters.title_arabic: باب لاَ تَقُومُ السَّاعَةُ حَتَّى تَخْرُجَ نَارٌ مِنْ أَرْضِ الْحِجَازِ

chapters.title: The Inhabitants Of Al-Madinah And How Far It Will Be Developed Before The Hour
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي سُكْنَى الْمَدِينَةِ وَعِمَارَتِهَا قَبْلَ السَّاعَةِ

chapters.title: Tribulation From The East, From Where The Horns Of The Shaitan Appear
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْفِتْنَةِ مِنَ الْمَشْرِقِ مِنْ حَيْثُ يَطْلُعُ قَرْنَا الشَّيْطَانِ

chapters.title: The Hour Will Not Begin Until Daws Worship Dhul-Khalasah
chapters.title_arabic: باب لاَ تَقُومُ السَّاعَةُ حَتَّى تَعْبُدَ دَوْسٌ ذَا الْخَلَصَةِ

chapters.title: The Hour Will Not Begin Until A Man Passes By Another Man's Grave And Wishes That He Was In The Place Of The Deceased, Because Of Calamity
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب لَا تَقُومُ السَّاعَةُ حَتَّى يَمُرَّ الرَّجُلُ بِقَبْرِ الرَّجُلِ فَيَتَمَنَّى أَنْ يَكُونَ مَكَانَ الْمَيِّتِ مِنْ الْبَلَاءِ

chapters.title: Ibn Sayyad
chapters.title_arabic: باب ذِكْرِ ابْنِ صَيَّادٍ

chapters.title: Ad-Dajjal
chapters.title_arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الدَّجَّالِ وَصِفَتِهِ وَمَا مَعَهُ

chapters.title: Description Of Ad-Dajjal; Al-Madinah Is Forbidden To Him; He Will Kill A Believer And Bring Him Back To Life
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي صِفَةِ الدَّجَّالِ وَتَحْرِيمِ الْمَدِينَةِ عَلَيْهِ وَقَتْلِهِ الْمُؤْمِنَ وَإِحْيَائِهِ

chapters.title: Ad-Dajjal Is Very Insignificant Before Allah
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي الدَّجَّالِ وَهُوَ أَهْوَنُ عَلَى اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ

chapters.title: The Emergence Of Ad-Dajjal And His Stay On Earth, And The Descent Of 'Eisa Who Will Kill Him. The Death Of The People Of Goodness And Faith, And The Survival Of The Worst Of People, And Their Idol-Worship. The Trumpet Blast, And The Resurrection Of Those Who Are In Their Graves
chapters.title_arabic: بَاب فِي خُرُوجِ الدَّجَّالِ وَمُكْثِهِ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَنُزُولِ عِيسَى وَقَتْلِهِ إِيَّاهُ

chapters.title: Al-Jassasah
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏{‏ قِصَّةِ الْجَسَّاسَةِ ‏}‏

chapters.title: The Rest Of The Ahadith About Ad-Dajjal
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي بَقِيَّةٍ مِنْ أَحَادِيثِ الدَّجَّالِ

chapters.title: The Virtue Of Worship At Times Of Turmoil
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْعِبَادَةِ فِي الْهَرْجِ

chapters.title: The Approach Of The Hour
chapters.title_arabic: باب قُرْبِ السَّاعَةِ

chapters.title: Between The Blasts (Of The Trumpet)
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا بَيْنَ النَّفْخَتَيْنِ

chapters.title: The Prohibition Of Entering Upon The People Of Al-Hijr (The Rocky Tract) Unless One Enters Weeping
chapters.title_arabic: باب لاَ تَدْخُلُوا مَسَاكِنَ الَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا أَنْفُسَهُمْ إِلاَّ أَنْ تَكُونُوا بَاكِينَ ‏.‏

chapters.title: The Virtue Of Treating Widows, The Poor And Orphans Kindly
chapters.title_arabic: باب الإِحْسَانِ إِلَى الأَرْمَلَةِ وَالْمِسْكِينِ وَالْيَتِيمِ

chapters.title: The Virtue Of Building Masajid
chapters.title_arabic: باب فَضْلِ بِنَاءِ الْمَسَاجِدِ

chapters.title: The Virtue Of Spending On The Poor And Wayfarers
chapters.title_arabic: باب الصَّدَقَةِ فِي الْمَسَاكِينِ

chapters.title: The Prohibition On Showing Off
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَنْ أَشْرَكَ فِي عَمَلِهِ غَيْرَ اللَّهِ

chapters.title: Guarding The Tongue
chapters.title_arabic: باب التَّكَلُّمِ بِالْكَلِمَةِ يَهْوِي بِهَا فِي النَّارِ

chapters.title: About The One Who Enjoins Good But Does Not Do It, And Forbids Evil But Does It
chapters.title_arabic: باب عُقُوبَةِ مَنْ يَأْمُرُ بِالْمَعْرُوفِ وَلاَ يَفْعَلُهُ وَيَنْهَى عَنِ الْمُنْكَرِ وَيَفْعَلُهُ

chapters.title: The Prohibition Against Disclosing One's Own Sins
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ هَتْكِ الإِنْسَانِ، سِتْرَ نَفْسِهِ

chapters.title: Saying: "May Allah Have Mercy On You" To One Who Sneezes, And Yawning Is Disliked
chapters.title_arabic: باب تَشْمِيتِ الْعَاطِسِ وَكَرَاهَةِ التَّثَاؤُبِ

chapters.title: Miscellaneous Ahadith
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي أَحَادِيثَ مُتَفَرِّقَةٍ

chapters.title: Mice Are A Transformed Race
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي الْفَأْرِ وَأَنَّهُ مَسْخٌ

chapters.title: A Believer Should Not Be Stung Twice From The Same Hole
chapters.title_arabic: باب لاَ يُلْدَغُ الْمُؤْمِنُ مِنْ جُحْرٍ مَرَّتَيْنِ

chapters.title: The Believer's Affair Is All Good
chapters.title_arabic: باب الْمُؤْمِنُ أَمْرُهُ كُلُّهُ خَيْرٌ

chapters.title: The Prohibition Of Praising if It Involves Exaggeration And There Is The Fear That It May Be A Source Of Temptation (Fitnah) For The One Who Is Praised
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ الْمَدْحِ، إِذَا كَانَ فِيهِ إِفْرَاطٌ وَخِيفَ مِنْهُ فِتْنَةٌ عَلَى الْمَمْدُوحِ

chapters.title: Showing Preference To The One Who Is Older
chapters.title_arabic: باب مُنَاوَلَةِ الأَكْبَرِ

chapters.title: Verification Of Hadith And The Ruling On Writing Down Knowledge
chapters.title_arabic: باب التَّثَبُّتِ فِي الْحَدِيثِ وَحُكْمِ كِتَابَةِ الْعِلْمِ

chapters.title: The Story Of The People Of The Ditch And The Magician, The Monk And The Boy
chapters.title_arabic: باب قِصَّةِ أَصْحَابِ الأُخْدُودِ وَالسَّاحِرِ وَالرَّاهِبِ وَالْغُلاَمِ

chapters.title: The Lengthy Hadith Of Jabir And The Story Of Abu Al-Yasar
chapters.title_arabic: باب حَدِيثِ جَابِرٍ الطَّوِيلِ وَقِصَّةِ أَبِي الْيَسَرِ

chapters.title: The Hadith Of The Hijrah
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي حَدِيثِ الْهِجْرَةِ وَيُقَالُ لَهُ حَدِيثُ الرَّحْلِ

chapters.title: Allah's Saying: "Has Not The Time Come For The Hearts Of Those Who Believe To Be Affected By Allah's Reminder"
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي قَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى ‏<qref chapter="57" verses="16">{‏ أَلَمْ يَأْنِ لِلَّذِينَ آمَنُوا أَنْ تَخْشَعَ قُلُوبُهُمْ لِذِكْرِ اللَّهِ}</qref>

chapters.title: Allah's Saying: "O Children Of Adam! Take Your Adornment While Praying"
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي قَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى ‏<qref chapter="7" verses="31">{‏خُذُوا زِينَتَكُمْ عِنْدَ كُلِّ مَسْجِدٍ}</qref>

chapters.title: Allah's Saying: "And Force Not Your Maids To Prostitution"
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي قَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى ‏<qref chapter="24" verses="33">{‏وَلاَ تُكْرِهُوا فَتَيَاتِكُمْ عَلَى الْبِغَاءِ}</qref>

chapters.title: Allah's Saving: "Those Whom They Call Upon Desire Means Of Access To Their Lord (Allah)"

chapters.title: Allah's Saying: "These Two Opponents Dispute With Each Other About Their Lord"
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي قَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى ‏<qref chapter="22" verses="19">{‏هَذَانِ خَصْمَانِ اخْتَصَمُوا فِي رَبِّهِمْ}</qref>

chapters.title: The Obligation of Transmitting on Authority of Trustworthy Narrators and Abandoning the Liars
chapters.intro:
Know - may Allah, exalted is He, grant you success – that what is obligatory upon everyone who is aware of the distinction between the Sahīh transmissions and their weak, the trustworthy narrators from those who stand accused, is to not transmit from them except what is known for the soundness of its emergence and the protection of its narrators; and that they fear what may be from those accused (of deficiency in narrating) and the stubborn people of innovation.

The proof that what we have said is required above what opposes it is in the verse: {Oh you who believe! If a sinful person comes to you with news, then verify it lest you afflict people through ignorance then you become sorry about what you did}[al-Hujurāt: 6]; and the verse: {… from whom you are pleased with from the witnesses}[al-Baqarah: 282] and the verse: {And let two who possess integrity among you bare witness}[at-Talāq: 2]. Thus it demonstrates what we mentioned from these two verses that the report of the sinful is dropped and not accepted, and that the testimony [Shahādah] of one who does not possess integrity is rejected, and the report [Khabar] as well- even though its significance is separated from the meaning of testimony in some respects, they are in agreement regarding the overall conditions they share since the report of the sinful is not acceptable according to Ahl ul-Ilm just as his testimony is rejected according to all of them . The Sunnah demonstrates the prohibition of transmitting abominable transmissions just as in the example from the Qur’ān regarding the prohibition of the report of the sinful.

There is a famous narration on authority of the Messenger of Allah, peace and blessings of Allah upon him, that: ‘Whoever relates on my authority a narration while aware that it is a lie, then he is one of the liars’ . Abū Bakr ibn Abī Shaybah narrated it to us that Wakī narrated to us, on authority of Shu’bah, on authority of al-Hakam, on authority of Abd ir-Rahman ibn Abī Laylā, on authority of Samurah bin Jundab. And also Abū Bakr ibn Abī Shaybah narrated to us, that Wakī narrated to us, on authority of Shu’bah and Sufyān, on authority of Habīb, on authority of Maymūn ibn Abī Shabīb, on authority of al-Mughīrat ibn Shu’bah, they both said that the Messenger of Allah, peace and blessings of Allah upon him, said the same thing.
chapters.title_arabic: باب وُجُوبِ الرِّوَايَةِ عَنِ الثِّقَاتِ، وَتَرْكِ الْكَذَّابِينَ
chapters.intro_arabic:
وَاعْلَمْ- وَفَّقَكَ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى- أَنَّ الْوَاجِبَ عَلَى كُلِّ أَحَدٍ عَرَفَ التَّمْيِيزَ بَيْنَ صَحِيحِ الرِّوَايَاتِ وَسَقِيمِهَا وَثِقَاتِ النَّاقِلِينَ لَهَا مِنَ الْمُتَّهَمِينَ أَنْ لاَ يَرْوِيَ مِنْهَا إِلاَّ مَا عَرَفَ صِحَّةَ مَخَارِجِهِ. وَالسِّتَارَةَ فِي نَاقِلِيهِ. وَأَنْ يَتَّقِيَ مِنْهَا مَا كَانَ مِنْهَا عَنْ أَهْلِ التُّهَمِ وَالْمُعَانِدِينَ مِنْ أَهْلِ الْبِدَعِ.

وَالدَّلِيلُ عَلَى أَنَّ الَّذِي قُلْنَا مِنْ هَذَا هُوَ اللاَّزِمُ دُونَ مَا خَالَفَهُ قَوْلُ اللَّهِ جَلَّ ذِكْرُهُ: {يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا إِنْ جَاءَكُمْ فَاسِقٌ بِنَبَإٍ فَتَبَيَّنُوا أَنْ تُصِيبُوا قَوْمًا بِجَهَالَةٍ فَتُصْبِحُوا عَلَى مَا فَعَلْتُمْ نَادِمِينَ} وَقَالَ جَلَّ ثَنَاؤُهُ: {مِمَّنْ تَرْضَوْنَ مِنَ الْشُّهَدَاءِ} وَقَالَ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ: {وَأَشْهِدُوا ذَوَيْ عَدْلٍ مِنْكُمْ} فَدَلَّ بِمَا ذَكَرْنَا مِنْ هَذِهِ الآيِ أَنَّ خَبَرَ الْفَاسِقِ سَاقِطٌ غَيْرُ مَقْبُولٍ وَأَنَّ شَهَادَةَ غَيْرِ الْعَدْلِ مَرْدُودَةٌ وَالْخَبَرُ وَإِنْ فَارَقَ مَعْنَاهُ مَعْنَى الشَّهَادَةِ فِي بَعْضِ الْوُجُوهِ فَقَدْ يَجْتَمِعَانِ فِي أَعْظَمِ مَعَانِيهِمَا إِذْ كَانَ خَبَرُ الْفَاسِقِ غَيْرَ مَقْبُولٍ عِنْدَ أَهْلِ الْعِلْمِ كَمَا أَنَّ شَهَادَتَهُ مَرْدُودَةٌ عِنْدَ جَمِيعِهِمْ وَدَلَّتِ السُّنَّةُ عَلَى نَفْيِ رِوَايَةِ الْمُنْكَرِ مِنَ الأَخْبَارِ كَنَحْوِ دَلاَلَةِ الْقُرْآنِ عَلَى نَفْيِ خَبَرِ الْفَاسِقِ. وَهُوَ الأَثَرُ الْمَشْهُورُ عَنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «مَنْ حَدَّثَ عَنِّي بِحَدِيثٍ يُرَى أَنَّهُ كَذِبٌ فَهُوَ أَحَدُ الْكَاذِبِينَ».

حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ أَبِي شَيْبَةَ حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ عَنْ شُعْبَةَ عَنِ الْحَكَمِ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي لَيْلَى عَنْ سَمُرَةَ بْنِ جُنْدَبٍ. (ح) وَحَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ أَبِي شَيْبَةَ أَيْضًا حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ عَنْ شُعْبَةَ وَسُفْيَانَ عَنْ حَبِيبٍ عَنْ مَيْمُونِ بْنِ أَبِي شَبِيبٍ عَنِ الْمُغِيرَةِ بْنِ شُعْبَةَ قَالاَ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ذَلِكَ.
